```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

## Packages and data

```{r}
#| label: loading packages and data
library(readr)
library(lme4)
library(AICcmodavg)
library(dplyr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(performance)
library(DHARMa)
library(tidyverse)
library(mgcv)
library(tibble)
library(ggbreak)

# change wd to wherever you downloaded the data
setwd (" ")

# load dfs
chem_fol <- read_csv("soil_leaf_chem.csv")
soil_comp <- read_csv("soil_resistance.csv")
leaf_traits <- read_csv("leaf_traits.csv")
seeds <- read_csv("seedlings.csv")
browse <- read_csv("vert_browse.csv")
```

## Soil and Foliar Chemistry

### NO3

#### glmm with site as random effect

```{r}
#| label: glmm soil and leaf chemistry

# --- prep ---
chem_fol$site         <- factor(chem_fol$site)
chem_fol$soil_type    <- factor(chem_fol$soil_type)
chem_fol$year_sampled <- factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)

# 1) center age on YEARS 
chem_fol$age_years <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25
chem_fol$age_years_centered <- chem_fol$age_years - mean(chem_fol$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

# Shorthand:
# S = soil_type
# D = Distance_m
# A = age_years_centered
# Y = year_sampled

# 0) null
NO3.t00 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 1–3) single predictors
NO3.t01 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

NO3.t02 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

NO3.t03 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 4–6) additive pairs
NO3.t04 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

NO3.t05 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

NO3.t06 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 7) additive triple
NO3.t07 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 8–10) single two-way interactions
NO3.t08 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D

NO3.t09 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A

NO3.t10 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A

# 11–13) one two-way interaction + third main effect
NO3.t11 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D + A

NO3.t12 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A + D

NO3.t13 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A + S

# 14–16) two two-way interactions together (plus mains)
NO3.t14 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + S:A

NO3.t15 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:Distance_m + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + D:A

NO3.t16 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:A + D:A

# 17) all three two-way interactions (plus mains)
NO3.t17 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 18) full three-way interaction (includes everything)
NO3.t18 <- glmmTMB(NO3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

```

#### Residuals: check residuals for additive and full model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for additive and full model No3
set.seed(1)

# Additive model diagnostics (NO3.t07)
res_no3_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = NO3.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_no3_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_no3_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_no3_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_no3_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (NO3.t18)
res_no3_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = NO3.t17, n = 1000)

plot(res_no3_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_no3_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_no3_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_no3_full)        # outlier check
```

#### compare models in AICc framework

```{r}
#| label: comparing models in AIC
# -------------------------
# 1) AICc table (19 models)
# -------------------------
NO3.aicc <- data.frame(
  model = c(
    "null",
    "soil",
    "dis",
    "age",
    "soil + dis",
    "soil + age",
    "dis + age",
    "soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis",
    "soil * age",
    "dis * age",
    "soil * dis + age",
    "soil * age + dis",
    "dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A",
    "S:D + D:A",
    "S:A + D:A",
    "all 2-ways",
    "3-way"
  ),
  AICc = c(
    AICc(NO3.t00),
    AICc(NO3.t01),
    AICc(NO3.t02),
    AICc(NO3.t03),
    AICc(NO3.t04),
    AICc(NO3.t05),
    AICc(NO3.t06),
    AICc(NO3.t07),
    AICc(NO3.t08),
    AICc(NO3.t09),
    AICc(NO3.t10),
    AICc(NO3.t11),
    AICc(NO3.t12),
    AICc(NO3.t13),
    AICc(NO3.t14),
    AICc(NO3.t15),
    AICc(NO3.t16),
    AICc(NO3.t17),
    AICc(NO3.t18)
  )
)

NO3.aicc$deltaAICc <- NO3.aicc$AICc - min(NO3.aicc$AICc)
NO3.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * NO3.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * NO3.aicc$deltaAICc))

# -------------------------
# 1b) R2 (marginal + conditional) for each model
# -------------------------

NO3.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(NO3.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NO3.t18)$R2_marginal
)

NO3.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(NO3.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NO3.t18)$R2_conditional
)



NO3.aicc <- NO3.aicc[order(NO3.aicc$AICc), ]
NO3.aicc


# ---------------------------------------------------
# 2) Coefficients ± SE for ALL models (conditional)
# ---------------------------------------------------
NO3.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t00)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c00$term <- rownames(NO3.c00); NO3.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(NO3.c00) <- NULL
NO3.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t01)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c01$term <- rownames(NO3.c01); NO3.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(NO3.c01) <- NULL
NO3.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t02)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c02$term <- rownames(NO3.c02); NO3.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(NO3.c02) <- NULL
NO3.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t03)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c03$term <- rownames(NO3.c03); NO3.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(NO3.c03) <- NULL
NO3.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t04)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c04$term <- rownames(NO3.c04); NO3.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(NO3.c04) <- NULL
NO3.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t05)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c05$term <- rownames(NO3.c05); NO3.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(NO3.c05) <- NULL
NO3.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t06)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c06$term <- rownames(NO3.c06); NO3.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(NO3.c06) <- NULL
NO3.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t07)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c07$term <- rownames(NO3.c07); NO3.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(NO3.c07) <- NULL
NO3.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t08)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c08$term <- rownames(NO3.c08); NO3.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(NO3.c08) <- NULL
NO3.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t09)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c09$term <- rownames(NO3.c09); NO3.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(NO3.c09) <- NULL
NO3.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t10)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c10$term <- rownames(NO3.c10); NO3.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(NO3.c10) <- NULL
NO3.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t11)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c11$term <- rownames(NO3.c11); NO3.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(NO3.c11) <- NULL
NO3.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t12)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c12$term <- rownames(NO3.c12); NO3.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(NO3.c12) <- NULL
NO3.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t13)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c13$term <- rownames(NO3.c13); NO3.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(NO3.c13) <- NULL
NO3.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t14)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c14$term <- rownames(NO3.c14); NO3.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(NO3.c14) <- NULL
NO3.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t15)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c15$term <- rownames(NO3.c15); NO3.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(NO3.c15) <- NULL
NO3.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t16)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c16$term <- rownames(NO3.c16); NO3.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(NO3.c16) <- NULL
NO3.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t17)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c17$term <- rownames(NO3.c17); NO3.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(NO3.c17) <- NULL
NO3.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(NO3.t18)$coefficients$cond); NO3.c18$term <- rownames(NO3.c18); NO3.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(NO3.c18) <- NULL

NO3.coefs_all <- bind_rows(
  NO3.c00, NO3.c01, NO3.c02, NO3.c03, NO3.c04, NO3.c05, NO3.c06, NO3.c07, NO3.c08, NO3.c09,
  NO3.c10, NO3.c11, NO3.c12, NO3.c13, NO3.c14, NO3.c15, NO3.c16, NO3.c17, NO3.c18
) %>%
  rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

# ---------------------------------------------------
# 3) Merge AICc info onto coefficients 
# ---------------------------------------------------
NO3.full_table <- left_join(NO3.coefs_all, NO3.aicc, by = "model") %>%
  arrange(AICc, model, term)

NO3.full_table

# ---------------------------------------------------
# 4) make it pretty/possible to read
# ---------------------------------------------------

# 1) model-level AICc info (one row per model)
NO3.aicc_unique <- NO3.full_table %>%
  select(model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(AICc)


# 2) coefficient strings (estimate ± SE), then pivot wide
NO3.coef_wide <- NO3.full_table %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se) %>%
  mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  select(model, term, est_se)

# Reed-style term names
NO3.coef_wide$term <- dplyr::recode(NO3.coef_wide$term,
                                    "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
                                    "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
                                    "Distance_m" = "Distance",
                                    "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
                                    "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m" = "Soil×Distance",
                                    "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Days",
                                    "Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance×Days",
                                    "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Distance×Days"
)

NO3.coef_wide2 <- NO3.coef_wide %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

# 3) final Table S1 block for NO3
NO3.TableS1 <- NO3.aicc_unique %>%
  left_join(NO3.coef_wide2, by = "model") %>%
  mutate(Response = "NO3") %>%
  select(
    Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, R2_marginal, R2_conditional, weight,
    Intercept, `Soil (Granite)`, Distance, `Years postmortem`,
    `Soil×Distance`, `Soil×Days`, `Distance×Days`, `Soil×Distance×Days`
  )

NO3.TableS1

```

#### Residuals: check residuals for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model No3

set.seed(1)
res_no3 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = NO3.t17, n = 1000)

plot(res_no3)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_no3)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_no3)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_no3)         # outlier check

```

#### Plotting - fig 1a

```{r}
#| label: Figure-1a-NO3

### NO3 — PREDICTION GRID + PLOT FOR “all 2-ways” MODEL (NO3.t17) ###
# Model uses: age_years_centered = age_years - mean(age_years)

# 0) year_sampled is required in newdata for predict(); hold at most frequent year
yr_ref <- names(sort(table(chem_fol$year_sampled), decreasing = TRUE))[1]

# 1) pick 3 representative ages (10th, 50th, 90th percentile) on ORIGINAL scale,
#    but do it in YEARS (since model is centered on years)
age_years_vec <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25

age_q10_yr <- as.numeric(quantile(age_years_vec, probs = 0.10, na.rm = TRUE))
age_q50_yr <- as.numeric(quantile(age_years_vec, probs = 0.50, na.rm = TRUE))
age_q90_yr <- as.numeric(quantile(age_years_vec, probs = 0.90, na.rm = TRUE))

# center in YEARS exactly like your model
age_mean_yr <- mean(age_years_vec, na.rm = TRUE)

age_c_q10 <- age_q10_yr - age_mean_yr
age_c_q50 <- age_q50_yr - age_mean_yr
age_c_q90 <- age_q90_yr - age_mean_yr

# 2) prediction grid
dist_seq <- seq(min(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  Distance_m   = dist_seq,
  soil_type    = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)),
  age_group    = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"),
  year_sampled = yr_ref
)

# map age_group to the centered-years values used in the model
pred_grid$age_years_centered <-
  ifelse(pred_grid$age_group == "Young (p10)", age_c_q10,
         ifelse(pred_grid$age_group == "Mid (p50)",  age_c_q50, age_c_q90))

pred_grid$soil_type <- factor(pred_grid$soil_type, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)))
pred_grid$age_group <- factor(pred_grid$age_group, levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))
pred_grid$year_sampled <- factor(pred_grid$year_sampled, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)))

# 3) predict on link scale with SE, then back-transform to response scale
p_link <- predict(NO3.t17, newdata = pred_grid, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link$fit)
pred_grid$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link$se.fit)

pred_grid$fit   <- exp(pred_grid$fit_link)
pred_grid$lower <- exp(pred_grid$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid$se_link)
pred_grid$upper <- exp(pred_grid$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid$se_link)

# 4) assign each observation to an age group for point coloring (BASED ON YEARS)
chem_fol_plot <- chem_fol
chem_fol_plot$age_years <- chem_fol_plot$age_days / 365.25

chem_fol_plot$age_group_pts <- ifelse(chem_fol_plot$age_years <= age_q10_yr, "Young (p10)",
                                      ifelse(chem_fol_plot$age_years >= age_q90_yr, "Old (p90)", "Mid (p50)"))
chem_fol_plot$age_group_pts <- factor(chem_fol_plot$age_group_pts,
                                      levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))

# Okabe–Ito (colorblind-safe)
cb_cols <- c(
  "Young (p10)" = "#0072B2",
  "Mid (p50)"   = "#E69F00",
  "Old (p90)"   = "#009E73"
)

ggplot(pred_grid, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  
  # POINTS: push way into the background
  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = NO3_mgkg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey60",
    alpha = 0.18,
    size = 0.9,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.45, height = 0)
  ) +
  
  # RIBBON
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group),
    alpha = 0.30,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  
  # LINE
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.3) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ soil_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab(expression(NO[3]~"(mg/kg)"))


```

```{r}
#| label: clean Figure-1a-NO3

gap_lo <- 1500
gap_hi <- 1800
top_comp <- 0.12

# plotting-only: remove points in the removed window so ggbreak can't "slice" them
chem_fol_plot <- subset(chem_fol, NO3_mgkg <= gap_lo | NO3_mgkg >= gap_hi)

p <- ggplot(pred_grid, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  
  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = NO3_mgkg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)   # horiz jitter only
  ) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group),
              alpha = 0.28, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ soil_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
  
  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab(expression(NO[3]~"(mg/kg)")) +
  
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    
    # kill right-side axis text/ticks/title AND the line/spine
    axis.text.y.right  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y.right  = element_blank(),
    
    # if ggbreak draws extra borders, this helps
    panel.border = element_blank()
  ) +
  
  # IMPORTANT: keep 1500 as a normal tick (lower panel); don't add it twice
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 250, 500, 1000, 1500, 2000, 4000, 6000))

# apply break:
# - start at 1500.01 so 1500 belongs only to the lower segment
p2 <- p + scale_y_break(c(gap_lo + 0.01, gap_hi), scales = top_comp)

p2
```

### NH3_mgkg

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm NH3 + AICc + selection NH3
# --- prep ---
chem_fol$site         <- factor(chem_fol$site)
chem_fol$soil_type    <- factor(chem_fol$soil_type)
chem_fol$year_sampled <- factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)

# 1) center age on YEARS
chem_fol$age_years <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25
chem_fol$age_years_centered <- chem_fol$age_years - mean(chem_fol$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

# Shorthand:
# S = soil_type
# D = Distance_m
# A = age_years_centered
# Y = year_sampled


# -------------------------
# Step 1) Fit 19 hierarchical models (up to 3-way)
#   NOTE: year_sampled is included in EVERY model as a fixed effect
# -------------------------

# 0) null
NH3.t00 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 1–3) single predictors
NH3.t01 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

NH3.t02 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

NH3.t03 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 4–6) additive pairs
NH3.t04 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

NH3.t05 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

NH3.t06 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 7) additive triple
NH3.t07 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 8–10) single two-way interactions
NH3.t08 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D

NH3.t09 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A

NH3.t10 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A

# 11–13) one two-way interaction + third main effect
NH3.t11 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D + A

NH3.t12 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A + D

NH3.t13 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A + S

# 14–16) two two-way interactions together (plus mains)
NH3.t14 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + S:A

NH3.t15 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:Distance_m + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + D:A

NH3.t16 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:A + D:A

# 17) all three two-way interactions (plus mains)
NH3.t17 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # all 2-ways

# 18) full three-way interaction (includes everything)
NH3.t18 <- glmmTMB(NH3_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # 3-way



# -------------------------
# Step 2) Model table: AICc / delta / weight + R2, then coef ± SE
# -------------------------
NH3.aicc <- data.frame(
  model = c(
    "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
  ),
  AICc = c(
    AICc(NH3.t00), AICc(NH3.t01), AICc(NH3.t02), AICc(NH3.t03), AICc(NH3.t04),
    AICc(NH3.t05), AICc(NH3.t06), AICc(NH3.t07), AICc(NH3.t08), AICc(NH3.t09),
    AICc(NH3.t10), AICc(NH3.t11), AICc(NH3.t12), AICc(NH3.t13), AICc(NH3.t14),
    AICc(NH3.t15), AICc(NH3.t16), AICc(NH3.t17), AICc(NH3.t18)
  )
)

NH3.aicc$deltaAICc <- NH3.aicc$AICc - min(NH3.aicc$AICc)
NH3.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * NH3.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * NH3.aicc$deltaAICc))

# R2 (Nakagawa): marginal + conditional
NH3.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(NH3.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(NH3.t18)$R2_marginal
)

NH3.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(NH3.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(NH3.t18)$R2_conditional
)

NH3.aicc <- NH3.aicc[order(NH3.aicc$AICc), ]
NH3.aicc  # <-- top model

# ---- coefficients ± SE (long) ----
NH3.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t00)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c00$term <- rownames(NH3.c00); NH3.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(NH3.c00) <- NULL
NH3.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t01)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c01$term <- rownames(NH3.c01); NH3.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(NH3.c01) <- NULL
NH3.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t02)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c02$term <- rownames(NH3.c02); NH3.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(NH3.c02) <- NULL
NH3.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t03)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c03$term <- rownames(NH3.c03); NH3.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(NH3.c03) <- NULL
NH3.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t04)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c04$term <- rownames(NH3.c04); NH3.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(NH3.c04) <- NULL
NH3.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t05)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c05$term <- rownames(NH3.c05); NH3.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(NH3.c05) <- NULL
NH3.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t06)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c06$term <- rownames(NH3.c06); NH3.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(NH3.c06) <- NULL
NH3.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t07)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c07$term <- rownames(NH3.c07); NH3.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(NH3.c07) <- NULL
NH3.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t08)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c08$term <- rownames(NH3.c08); NH3.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(NH3.c08) <- NULL
NH3.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t09)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c09$term <- rownames(NH3.c09); NH3.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(NH3.c09) <- NULL
NH3.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t10)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c10$term <- rownames(NH3.c10); NH3.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(NH3.c10) <- NULL
NH3.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t11)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c11$term <- rownames(NH3.c11); NH3.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(NH3.c11) <- NULL
NH3.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t12)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c12$term <- rownames(NH3.c12); NH3.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(NH3.c12) <- NULL
NH3.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t13)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c13$term <- rownames(NH3.c13); NH3.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(NH3.c13) <- NULL
NH3.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t14)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c14$term <- rownames(NH3.c14); NH3.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(NH3.c14) <- NULL
NH3.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t15)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c15$term <- rownames(NH3.c15); NH3.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(NH3.c15) <- NULL
NH3.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t16)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c16$term <- rownames(NH3.c16); NH3.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(NH3.c16) <- NULL
NH3.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t17)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c17$term <- rownames(NH3.c17); NH3.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(NH3.c17) <- NULL
NH3.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(NH3.t18)$coefficients$cond); NH3.c18$term <- rownames(NH3.c18); NH3.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(NH3.c18) <- NULL

NH3.coefs_all <- bind_rows(
  NH3.c00, NH3.c01, NH3.c02, NH3.c03, NH3.c04, NH3.c05, NH3.c06, NH3.c07, NH3.c08, NH3.c09,
  NH3.c10, NH3.c11, NH3.c12, NH3.c13, NH3.c14, NH3.c15, NH3.c16, NH3.c17, NH3.c18
) %>%
  rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

NH3.full_table <- left_join(NH3.coefs_all, NH3.aicc, by = "model") %>%
  arrange(AICc, model, term)

# ---- make Table S1-style wide block ----
NH3.aicc_unique <- NH3.full_table %>%
  select(model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(AICc)

NH3.coef_wide <- NH3.full_table %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se) %>%
  mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  select(model, term, est_se)

# recode ONLY the terms you want to display in Table S1
NH3.coef_wide$term <- dplyr::recode(NH3.coef_wide$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "Distance_m" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m" = "Soil×Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Years",
  "Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance×Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Distance×Years"
)

NH3.coef_wide2 <- NH3.coef_wide %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

NH3.TableS1 <- NH3.aicc_unique %>%
  left_join(NH3.coef_wide2, by = "model") %>%
  mutate(Response = "NH3") %>%
  select(
    Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional,
    Intercept, `Soil (Granite)`, Distance, `Years postmortem`,
    `Soil×Distance`, `Soil×Years`, `Distance×Years`, `Soil×Distance×Years`
  )

NH3.TableS1


```

#### Residuals: check for additive, full, and top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model NH3


set.seed(1)

# Additive model diagnostics (NH3.t07)
res_nh3_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = NH3.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_nh3_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_nh3_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_nh3_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_nh3_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (NH3.t18)
res_nh3_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = NH3.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_nh3_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_nh3_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_nh3_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_nh3_full)        # outlier check


### DHARMa residual diagnostics for top NH3 model (NH3.t18 = 3-way) ###

set.seed(1)
res_nh3 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = NH3.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_nh3)
testUniformity(res_nh3)
testDispersion(res_nh3)
testOutliers(res_nh3)


```

#### Plotting - Fig 1b

```{r}
#| label: Figure-1b-NH3

### NH3 — prediction grid + colorblind-safe plot for TOP MODEL (NH3.t18 = 3-way) ###

# 0) year_sampled is required in newdata for predict(); hold at most frequent year
yr_ref <- names(sort(table(chem_fol$year_sampled), decreasing = TRUE))[1]

# 1) pick 3 representative ages (p10/p50/p90) on ORIGINAL scale, but in YEARS
age_years_vec <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25

age_q10_yr <- as.numeric(quantile(age_years_vec, probs = 0.10, na.rm = TRUE))
age_q50_yr <- as.numeric(quantile(age_years_vec, probs = 0.50, na.rm = TRUE))
age_q90_yr <- as.numeric(quantile(age_years_vec, probs = 0.90, na.rm = TRUE))

# center in YEARS exactly like your model
age_mean_yr <- mean(age_years_vec, na.rm = TRUE)

age_c_q10 <- age_q10_yr - age_mean_yr
age_c_q50 <- age_q50_yr - age_mean_yr
age_c_q90 <- age_q90_yr - age_mean_yr

# 2) prediction grid
dist_seq <- seq(min(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

pred_grid_nh3 <- expand.grid(
  Distance_m   = dist_seq,
  soil_type    = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)),
  age_group    = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"),
  year_sampled = yr_ref
)

# map age_group -> centered years used in model
pred_grid_nh3$age_years_centered <-
  ifelse(pred_grid_nh3$age_group == "Young (p10)", age_c_q10,
  ifelse(pred_grid_nh3$age_group == "Mid (p50)",  age_c_q50, age_c_q90))

pred_grid_nh3$soil_type <- factor(pred_grid_nh3$soil_type, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)))
pred_grid_nh3$age_group <- factor(pred_grid_nh3$age_group, levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))
pred_grid_nh3$year_sampled <- factor(pred_grid_nh3$year_sampled, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)))

# 3) predict on link scale with SE, then back-transform
p_link_nh3 <- predict(NH3.t18, newdata = pred_grid_nh3, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_nh3$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link_nh3$fit)
pred_grid_nh3$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link_nh3$se.fit)

pred_grid_nh3$fit   <- exp(pred_grid_nh3$fit_link)
pred_grid_nh3$lower <- exp(pred_grid_nh3$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_nh3$se_link)
pred_grid_nh3$upper <- exp(pred_grid_nh3$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_nh3$se_link)

# 4) plot (Okabe–Ito palette: colorblind-safe)
cb_cols <- c(
  "Young (p10)" = "#0072B2",
  "Mid (p50)"   = "#E69F00",
  "Old (p90)"   = "#009E73"
)

ggplot(pred_grid_nh3, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    geom_point(
    data = chem_fol,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = NH3_mgkg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey60",
    alpha = 0.18,
    size = 0.9,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.45, height = 0)
  ) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group), alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  facet_wrap(~ soil_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols, name = "Years postmortem") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols, name = "Years postmortem") +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab(expression(NH[3]~"(mg/kg)"))

```

```{r}
#| label: clean Figure-1b-NH3

gap_lo <- 150
gap_hi <- 200
top_comp <- 0.12

# plotting-only: remove points in the removed window so ggbreak can't "slice" them
chem_fol_plot <- subset(chem_fol, NH3_mgkg <= gap_lo | NH3_mgkg >= gap_hi)

p <- ggplot(pred_grid_nh3, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = NH3_mgkg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)   # horiz jitter only
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group),
              alpha = 0.28, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +

  facet_wrap(~ soil_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +

  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab(expression(NH[3]~"(mg/kg)")) +

  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),

    # kill right-side axis text/ticks/title AND the line/spine
    axis.text.y.right  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y.right  = element_blank(),

    # if ggbreak draws extra borders, this helps
    panel.border = element_blank()
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 100, 150, 200, 400, 600))

# apply break:
# start at gap_lo + 0.01 so 150 belongs only to the lower segment
p2 <- p + scale_y_break(c(gap_lo + 0.01, gap_hi), scales = top_comp)

p2



```

### PO4

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm PO4 AICc selection PO4

### PO4 — STEP 1 (19 glmmTMB models; Gamma(log); includes year_sampled; age centered in YEARS)

# -------------------------
# Prep
# -------------------------
chem_fol$site         <- factor(chem_fol$site)
chem_fol$soil_type    <- factor(chem_fol$soil_type)
chem_fol$year_sampled <- factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)

# center age on YEARS (do not use scaled days)
chem_fol$age_years <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25
chem_fol$age_years_centered <- chem_fol$age_years - mean(chem_fol$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)


# Shorthand:
# S = soil_type
# D = Distance_m
# A = age_years_centered
# Y = year_sampled

# -------------------------
# Step 1) Fit 19 hierarchical models (up to 3-way), all include year_sampled + (1|site)
# -------------------------

# 0) null (year only)
PO4.t00 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 1–3) single predictors (+year)
PO4.t01 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

PO4.t02 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

PO4.t03 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 4–6) additive pairs (+year)
PO4.t04 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

PO4.t05 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

PO4.t06 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 7) additive triple (+year)
PO4.t07 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 8–10) single two-way interactions (+year)
PO4.t08 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D

PO4.t09 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A

PO4.t10 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A

# 11–13) one two-way interaction + third main effect (+year)
PO4.t11 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D + A

PO4.t12 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + Distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A + D

PO4.t13 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A + S

# 14–16) two two-way interactions together (plus mains) (+year)
PO4.t14 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + S:A

PO4.t15 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:Distance_m + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + D:A

PO4.t16 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:A + D:A

# 17) all three two-way interactions (plus mains) (+year)
PO4.t17 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # all 2-ways

# 18) full three-way interaction (includes everything) (+year)
PO4.t18 <- glmmTMB(PO4_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # 3-way



# -------------------------
# Step 2) Model table: AICc / delta / weight + R2, then coef ± SE
# -------------------------
PO4.aicc <- data.frame(
  model = c(
    "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
  ),
  AICc = c(
    AICc(PO4.t00), AICc(PO4.t01), AICc(PO4.t02), AICc(PO4.t03), AICc(PO4.t04),
    AICc(PO4.t05), AICc(PO4.t06), AICc(PO4.t07), AICc(PO4.t08), AICc(PO4.t09),
    AICc(PO4.t10), AICc(PO4.t11), AICc(PO4.t12), AICc(PO4.t13), AICc(PO4.t14),
    AICc(PO4.t15), AICc(PO4.t16), AICc(PO4.t17), AICc(PO4.t18)
  )
)

PO4.aicc$deltaAICc <- PO4.aicc$AICc - min(PO4.aicc$AICc)
PO4.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * PO4.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * PO4.aicc$deltaAICc))

PO4.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(PO4.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PO4.t18)$R2_marginal
)

PO4.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(PO4.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PO4.t18)$R2_conditional
)

PO4.aicc <- PO4.aicc[order(PO4.aicc$AICc), ]
PO4.aicc  # <-- top model is first row

# ---- coefficients ± SE (long) ----
PO4.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t00)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c00$term <- rownames(PO4.c00); PO4.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(PO4.c00) <- NULL
PO4.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t01)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c01$term <- rownames(PO4.c01); PO4.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(PO4.c01) <- NULL
PO4.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t02)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c02$term <- rownames(PO4.c02); PO4.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(PO4.c02) <- NULL
PO4.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t03)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c03$term <- rownames(PO4.c03); PO4.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(PO4.c03) <- NULL
PO4.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t04)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c04$term <- rownames(PO4.c04); PO4.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(PO4.c04) <- NULL
PO4.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t05)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c05$term <- rownames(PO4.c05); PO4.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(PO4.c05) <- NULL
PO4.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t06)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c06$term <- rownames(PO4.c06); PO4.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(PO4.c06) <- NULL
PO4.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t07)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c07$term <- rownames(PO4.c07); PO4.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(PO4.c07) <- NULL
PO4.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t08)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c08$term <- rownames(PO4.c08); PO4.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(PO4.c08) <- NULL
PO4.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t09)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c09$term <- rownames(PO4.c09); PO4.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(PO4.c09) <- NULL
PO4.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t10)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c10$term <- rownames(PO4.c10); PO4.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(PO4.c10) <- NULL
PO4.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t11)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c11$term <- rownames(PO4.c11); PO4.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(PO4.c11) <- NULL
PO4.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t12)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c12$term <- rownames(PO4.c12); PO4.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(PO4.c12) <- NULL
PO4.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t13)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c13$term <- rownames(PO4.c13); PO4.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(PO4.c13) <- NULL
PO4.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t14)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c14$term <- rownames(PO4.c14); PO4.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(PO4.c14) <- NULL
PO4.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t15)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c15$term <- rownames(PO4.c15); PO4.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(PO4.c15) <- NULL
PO4.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t16)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c16$term <- rownames(PO4.c16); PO4.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(PO4.c16) <- NULL
PO4.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t17)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c17$term <- rownames(PO4.c17); PO4.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(PO4.c17) <- NULL
PO4.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(PO4.t18)$coefficients$cond); PO4.c18$term <- rownames(PO4.c18); PO4.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(PO4.c18) <- NULL

PO4.coefs_all <- bind_rows(
  PO4.c00, PO4.c01, PO4.c02, PO4.c03, PO4.c04, PO4.c05, PO4.c06, PO4.c07, PO4.c08, PO4.c09,
  PO4.c10, PO4.c11, PO4.c12, PO4.c13, PO4.c14, PO4.c15, PO4.c16, PO4.c17, PO4.c18
) %>%
  rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

PO4.full_table <- left_join(PO4.coefs_all, PO4.aicc, by = "model") %>%
  arrange(AICc, model, term)

# ---- Table S1-style wide block ----
PO4.aicc_unique <- PO4.full_table %>%
  select(model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(AICc)

PO4.coef_wide <- PO4.full_table %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se) %>%
  mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  select(model, term, est_se)

# UPDATED term recodes for YEARS-centered workflow + year_sampled terms
PO4.coef_wide$term <- dplyr::recode(PO4.coef_wide$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "Distance_m" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m" = "Soil×Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Years",
  "Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance×Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Distance×Years"
)

PO4.coef_wide2 <- PO4.coef_wide %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

PO4.TableS1 <- PO4.aicc_unique %>%
  left_join(PO4.coef_wide2, by = "model") %>%
  mutate(Response = "PO4") %>%
  select(
    Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional,
    Intercept, `Soil (Granite)`, Distance, `Years postmortem`,
    `Soil×Distance`, `Soil×Years`, `Distance×Years`, `Soil×Distance×Years`
  )

PO4.TableS1


PO4.TableS1

```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model PO4

set.seed(1)

# Additive model diagnostics (PO4.t07)
res_PO4_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = PO4.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_PO4_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_PO4_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_PO4_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_PO4_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (PO4.t18)
res_PO4_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = PO4.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_PO4_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_PO4_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_PO4_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_PO4_full)        # outlier check


### Step 3) DHARMa residual diagnostics for top PO4 model (PO4.t18 = 3-way; Gamma; half-DL) ###

set.seed(1)
res_po4 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = PO4.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_po4)
testUniformity(res_po4)
testDispersion(res_po4)
testOutliers(res_po4)


```

#### Plotting - Fig 1c

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 1c PO4
### Step 4) PO4 — prediction grid + plot for TOP MODEL (PO4.t18 = 3-way), YEARS-centered + points ###

# 0) year_sampled is required in newdata for predict(); hold at most frequent year
yr_ref <- names(sort(table(chem_fol$year_sampled), decreasing = TRUE))[1]

# 1) pick 3 representative ages (p10/p50/p90) on ORIGINAL scale, but in YEARS
age_years_vec <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25

age_q10_yr <- as.numeric(quantile(age_years_vec, probs = 0.10, na.rm = TRUE))
age_q50_yr <- as.numeric(quantile(age_years_vec, probs = 0.50, na.rm = TRUE))
age_q90_yr <- as.numeric(quantile(age_years_vec, probs = 0.90, na.rm = TRUE))

# center in YEARS exactly like the model
age_mean_yr <- mean(age_years_vec, na.rm = TRUE)

age_c_q10 <- age_q10_yr - age_mean_yr
age_c_q50 <- age_q50_yr - age_mean_yr
age_c_q90 <- age_q90_yr - age_mean_yr

# 2) prediction grid
dist_seq <- seq(min(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

pred_grid_po4 <- expand.grid(
  Distance_m   = dist_seq,
  soil_type    = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)),
  age_group    = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"),
  year_sampled = yr_ref
)

# map age_group -> centered years used in model
pred_grid_po4$age_years_centered <-
  ifelse(pred_grid_po4$age_group == "Young (p10)", age_c_q10,
  ifelse(pred_grid_po4$age_group == "Mid (p50)",  age_c_q50, age_c_q90))

pred_grid_po4$soil_type <- factor(pred_grid_po4$soil_type, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)))
pred_grid_po4$age_group <- factor(pred_grid_po4$age_group, levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))
pred_grid_po4$year_sampled <- factor(pred_grid_po4$year_sampled, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)))

# 3) predict on link scale with SE, then back-transform
p_link_po4 <- predict(PO4.t18, newdata = pred_grid_po4, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_po4$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link_po4$fit)
pred_grid_po4$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link_po4$se.fit)

pred_grid_po4$fit   <- exp(pred_grid_po4$fit_link)
pred_grid_po4$lower <- exp(pred_grid_po4$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_po4$se_link)
pred_grid_po4$upper <- exp(pred_grid_po4$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_po4$se_link)

# 4) plot (Okabe–Ito palette: colorblind-safe) + POINTS
cb_cols <- c(
  "Young (p10)" = "#0072B2",
  "Mid (p50)"   = "#E69F00",
  "Old (p90)"   = "#009E73"
)

ggplot(pred_grid_po4, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  # points behind the ribbons/lines
  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = PO4_mgkg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey60",
    alpha = 0.18,
    size = 0.9,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.45, height = 0)
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group), alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  facet_wrap(~ soil_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols, name = "Years postmortem") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols, name = "Years postmortem") +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab(expression(PO[4]~"(mg/kg)"))

```

```{r}
#| label: clean Figure-1c-PO4

gap_lo <- 100
gap_hi <- 120
top_comp <- 0.12

# plotting-only: remove points in the removed window so ggbreak can't "slice" them
chem_fol_plot <- subset(chem_fol, PO4_mgkg <= gap_lo | PO4_mgkg >= gap_hi)

p <- ggplot(pred_grid_po4, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = PO4_mgkg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)   # horiz jitter only
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group),
              alpha = 0.28, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +

  facet_wrap(~ soil_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +

  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab(expression(PO[4]~"(mg/kg)")) +

  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),

    # kill right-side axis text/ticks/title AND the line/spine
    axis.text.y.right  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y.right  = element_blank(),

    panel.border = element_blank()
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100, 200, 400))
# apply break:
# start at gap_lo + 0.01 so gap_lo belongs only to the lower segment
p2 <- p + scale_y_break(c(gap_lo + 0.01, gap_hi), scales = top_comp)

p2



```

### P_Bray

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm P_Bray  AICc  selection P_bray
### P_Bray_I_mgkg — STEP 1 (19 glmmTMB models; Gamma(log); includes year_sampled; age centered in YEARS)

# -------------------------
# Prep
# -------------------------
chem_fol$site         <- factor(chem_fol$site)
chem_fol$soil_type    <- factor(chem_fol$soil_type)
chem_fol$year_sampled <- factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)

# center age on YEARS (do not use scaled days)
chem_fol$age_years <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25
chem_fol$age_years_centered <- chem_fol$age_years - mean(chem_fol$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

# Shorthand:
# S = soil_type
# D = Distance_m
# A = age_years_centered
# Y = year_sampled

# -------------------------
# Step 1) Fit 19 hierarchical models (up to 3-way), all include year_sampled + (1|site)
# -------------------------

# 0) null (year only)
PBray.t00 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 1–3) single predictors (+year)
PBray.t01 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

PBray.t02 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

PBray.t03 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 4–6) additive pairs (+year)
PBray.t04 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

PBray.t05 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

PBray.t06 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 7) additive triple (+year)
PBray.t07 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 8–10) single two-way interactions (+year)
PBray.t08 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D

PBray.t09 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A

PBray.t10 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A

# 11–13) one two-way interaction + third main effect (+year)
PBray.t11 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D + A

PBray.t12 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + Distance_m + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A + D

PBray.t13 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A + S

# 14–16) two two-way interactions together (plus mains) (+year)
PBray.t14 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                       soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + S:A

PBray.t15 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                       soil_type:Distance_m + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + D:A

PBray.t16 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                       soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:A + D:A

# 17) all three two-way interactions (plus mains) (+year)
PBray.t17 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                       soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # all 2-ways

# 18) full three-way interaction (includes everything) (+year)
PBray.t18 <- glmmTMB(P_Bray_I_mgkg ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # 3-way


# -------------------------
# Step 2) Model table: AICc / delta / weight + R2, then coef ± SE
# -------------------------
PBray.aicc <- data.frame(
  model = c(
    "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
  ),
  AICc = c(
    AICc(PBray.t00), AICc(PBray.t01), AICc(PBray.t02), AICc(PBray.t03), AICc(PBray.t04),
    AICc(PBray.t05), AICc(PBray.t06), AICc(PBray.t07), AICc(PBray.t08), AICc(PBray.t09),
    AICc(PBray.t10), AICc(PBray.t11), AICc(PBray.t12), AICc(PBray.t13), AICc(PBray.t14),
    AICc(PBray.t15), AICc(PBray.t16), AICc(PBray.t17), AICc(PBray.t18)
  )
)

PBray.aicc$deltaAICc <- PBray.aicc$AICc - min(PBray.aicc$AICc)
PBray.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * PBray.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * PBray.aicc$deltaAICc))

PBray.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(PBray.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(PBray.t18)$R2_marginal
)

PBray.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(PBray.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(PBray.t18)$R2_conditional
)

PBray.aicc <- PBray.aicc[order(PBray.aicc$AICc), ]
PBray.aicc  # <-- top model is first row

# ---- coefficients ± SE (long) ----
PBray.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t00)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c00$term <- rownames(PBray.c00); PBray.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(PBray.c00) <- NULL
PBray.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t01)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c01$term <- rownames(PBray.c01); PBray.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(PBray.c01) <- NULL
PBray.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t02)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c02$term <- rownames(PBray.c02); PBray.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(PBray.c02) <- NULL
PBray.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t03)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c03$term <- rownames(PBray.c03); PBray.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(PBray.c03) <- NULL
PBray.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t04)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c04$term <- rownames(PBray.c04); PBray.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(PBray.c04) <- NULL
PBray.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t05)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c05$term <- rownames(PBray.c05); PBray.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(PBray.c05) <- NULL
PBray.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t06)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c06$term <- rownames(PBray.c06); PBray.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(PBray.c06) <- NULL
PBray.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t07)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c07$term <- rownames(PBray.c07); PBray.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(PBray.c07) <- NULL
PBray.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t08)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c08$term <- rownames(PBray.c08); PBray.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(PBray.c08) <- NULL
PBray.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t09)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c09$term <- rownames(PBray.c09); PBray.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(PBray.c09) <- NULL
PBray.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t10)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c10$term <- rownames(PBray.c10); PBray.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(PBray.c10) <- NULL
PBray.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t11)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c11$term <- rownames(PBray.c11); PBray.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(PBray.c11) <- NULL
PBray.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t12)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c12$term <- rownames(PBray.c12); PBray.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(PBray.c12) <- NULL
PBray.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t13)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c13$term <- rownames(PBray.c13); PBray.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(PBray.c13) <- NULL
PBray.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t14)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c14$term <- rownames(PBray.c14); PBray.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(PBray.c14) <- NULL
PBray.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t15)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c15$term <- rownames(PBray.c15); PBray.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(PBray.c15) <- NULL
PBray.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t16)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c16$term <- rownames(PBray.c16); PBray.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(PBray.c16) <- NULL
PBray.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t17)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c17$term <- rownames(PBray.c17); PBray.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(PBray.c17) <- NULL
PBray.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(PBray.t18)$coefficients$cond); PBray.c18$term <- rownames(PBray.c18); PBray.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(PBray.c18) <- NULL

PBray.coefs_all <- bind_rows(
  PBray.c00, PBray.c01, PBray.c02, PBray.c03, PBray.c04, PBray.c05, PBray.c06, PBray.c07, PBray.c08, PBray.c09,
  PBray.c10, PBray.c11, PBray.c12, PBray.c13, PBray.c14, PBray.c15, PBray.c16, PBray.c17, PBray.c18
) %>%
  rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

PBray.full_table <- left_join(PBray.coefs_all, PBray.aicc, by = "model") %>%
  arrange(AICc, model, term)

# ---- Table S1-style wide block ----
PBray.aicc_unique <- PBray.full_table %>%
  select(model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(AICc)

PBray.coef_wide <- PBray.full_table %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se) %>%
  mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  select(model, term, est_se)

# UPDATED term recodes for YEARS-centered workflow (+ year_sampled is left as-is)
PBray.coef_wide$term <- dplyr::recode(PBray.coef_wide$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "Distance_m" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m" = "Soil×Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Years",
  "Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance×Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Distance×Years"
)

PBray.coef_wide2 <- PBray.coef_wide %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

PBray.TableS1 <- PBray.aicc_unique %>%
  left_join(PBray.coef_wide2, by = "model") %>%
  mutate(Response = "P_Bray_I") %>%
  select(
    Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional,
    Intercept, `Soil (Granite)`, Distance, `Years postmortem`,
    `Soil×Distance`, `Soil×Years`, `Distance×Years`, `Soil×Distance×Years`
  )

PBray.TableS1


```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model P_Bray

set.seed(1)

# Additive model diagnostics (PBray.t07)
res_PBray_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = PBray.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_PBray_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_PBray_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_PBray_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_PBray_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (PBray.t18)
res_PBray_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = PBray.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_PBray_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_PBray_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_PBray_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_PBray_full)        # outlier check



### Step 3) DHARMa residual diagnostics — Bray-1 P top model(s) ###

# Top model: soil * dis (PBray.t08)
set.seed(1)
res_pbray_top <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = PBray.t08, n = 1000)
plot(res_pbray_top)
testUniformity(res_pbray_top)
testDispersion(res_pbray_top)
testOutliers(res_pbray_top)

```

#### Plotting - Fig 1d

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 1d P_Bray

###### Step 4) Bray-1 P — prediction grid + plot for TOP MODEL (PBray.t08 = soil * dis) ###
### Updated for year_sampled requirement + new palette (NOT blue-ish)

# 0) year_sampled is required in newdata for predict(); hold at most frequent year
yr_ref <- names(sort(table(chem_fol$year_sampled), decreasing = TRUE))[1]

# prediction grid (distance range, both soils)
dist_seq <- seq(min(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

pred_grid_pbray <- expand.grid(
  Distance_m   = dist_seq,
  soil_type    = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)),
  year_sampled = yr_ref
)

pred_grid_pbray$soil_type <- factor(pred_grid_pbray$soil_type, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)))
pred_grid_pbray$year_sampled <- factor(pred_grid_pbray$year_sampled, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)))

# predict on link scale with SE, then back-transform
p_link_pbray <- predict(PBray.t08, newdata = pred_grid_pbray, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_pbray$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link_pbray$fit)
pred_grid_pbray$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link_pbray$se.fit)

pred_grid_pbray$fit   <- exp(pred_grid_pbray$fit_link)
pred_grid_pbray$lower <- exp(pred_grid_pbray$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_pbray$se_link)
pred_grid_pbray$upper <- exp(pred_grid_pbray$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_pbray$se_link)

# colorblind-safe pair, deliberately NOT blue-ish:
soil_cols <- c(
  "Basalt"  = "#D94801",  # orange
  "Granite" = "#984EA3"   # purple
)

ggplot(pred_grid_pbray, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = soil_type, fill = soil_type)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  # points behind (optional but included since you asked “shitty graph”)
  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = P_Bray_I_mgkg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey60",
    alpha = 0.20,
    size = 1.0,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.35, height = 0)
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = soil_type), alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  scale_color_manual(values = soil_cols, name = "Soil type") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = soil_cols, name = "Soil type") +
  guides(fill = "none") +

  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab("Predicted Bray-1 P (mg/kg)")



```

```{r}
#| label: clean Figure-1d-PBray

gap_lo <- 300
gap_hi <- 400
top_comp <- 0.12

# plotting-only: remove points in the removed window so ggbreak can't "slice" them
chem_fol_plot <- subset(chem_fol, P_Bray_I_mgkg <= gap_lo | P_Bray_I_mgkg >= gap_hi)

p <- ggplot(pred_grid_pbray, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = soil_type, fill = soil_type)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = P_Bray_I_mgkg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)   # horiz jitter only
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = soil_type),
              alpha = 0.28, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +

  scale_color_manual(values = soil_cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = soil_cols) +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +

  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab("Bray-1 P (mg/kg)") +

  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),

    # kill right-side axis text/ticks/title AND the line/spine
    axis.text.y.right  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y.right  = element_blank(),

    panel.border = element_blank()
  )+

  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 50, 100, 150, 300, 500, 1500))

# apply break:
# start at gap_lo + 0.01 so gap_lo belongs only to the lower segment
p2 <- p + scale_y_break(c(gap_lo + 0.01, gap_hi), scales = top_comp)

p2


```

### N.per

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm Percent N  AICc  selection

### N.per — STEP 1 (19 glmmTMB models; Gamma(log); includes year_sampled; age centered in YEARS)

# -------------------------
# Prep
# -------------------------
chem_fol$site         <- factor(chem_fol$site)
chem_fol$soil_type    <- factor(chem_fol$soil_type)
chem_fol$year_sampled <- factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)

# center age on YEARS (do not use scaled days)
chem_fol$age_years <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25
chem_fol$age_years_centered <- chem_fol$age_years - mean(chem_fol$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

# Shorthand:
# S = soil_type
# D = Distance_m
# A = age_years_centered
# Y = year_sampled

# -------------------------
# Step 1) Fit 19 hierarchical models (up to 3-way), all include year_sampled + (1|site)
# -------------------------

# 0) null (year only)
Nper.t00 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 1–3) single predictors (+year)
Nper.t01 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nper.t02 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nper.t03 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 4–6) additive pairs (+year)
Nper.t04 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nper.t05 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nper.t06 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 7) additive triple (+year)
Nper.t07 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

# 8–10) single two-way interactions (+year)
Nper.t08 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D

Nper.t09 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A

Nper.t10 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A

# 11–13) one two-way interaction + third main effect (+year)
Nper.t11 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*D + A

Nper.t12 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + Distance_m + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S*A + D

Nper.t13 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # D*A + S

# 14–16) two two-way interactions together (plus mains) (+year)
Nper.t14 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + S:A

Nper.t15 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:Distance_m + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:D + D:A

Nper.t16 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # S:A + D:A

# 17) all three two-way interactions (plus mains) (+year)
Nper.t17 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # all 2-ways

# 18) full three-way interaction (+year)
Nper.t18 <- glmmTMB(N.per ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)  # 3-way


# -------------------------
# Step 2) Model table: AICc / delta / weight + R2, then coef ± SE
# -------------------------
Nper.aicc <- data.frame(
  model = c(
    "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
  ),
  AICc = c(
    AICc(Nper.t00), AICc(Nper.t01), AICc(Nper.t02), AICc(Nper.t03), AICc(Nper.t04),
    AICc(Nper.t05), AICc(Nper.t06), AICc(Nper.t07), AICc(Nper.t08), AICc(Nper.t09),
    AICc(Nper.t10), AICc(Nper.t11), AICc(Nper.t12), AICc(Nper.t13), AICc(Nper.t14),
    AICc(Nper.t15), AICc(Nper.t16), AICc(Nper.t17), AICc(Nper.t18)
  )
)

Nper.aicc$deltaAICc <- Nper.aicc$AICc - min(Nper.aicc$AICc)
Nper.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * Nper.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * Nper.aicc$deltaAICc))

Nper.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(Nper.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t02)$R2_marginal,
```
