```{r}
  performance::r2(Nper.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nper.t18)$R2_marginal
)

Nper.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(Nper.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nper.t18)$R2_conditional
)

Nper.aicc <- Nper.aicc[order(Nper.aicc$AICc), ]
Nper.aicc  # <-- top model is first row

# ---- coefficients ± SE (long) ----
Nper.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t00)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c00$term <- rownames(Nper.c00); Nper.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(Nper.c00) <- NULL
Nper.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t01)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c01$term <- rownames(Nper.c01); Nper.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(Nper.c01) <- NULL
Nper.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t02)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c02$term <- rownames(Nper.c02); Nper.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(Nper.c02) <- NULL
Nper.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t03)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c03$term <- rownames(Nper.c03); Nper.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(Nper.c03) <- NULL
Nper.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t04)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c04$term <- rownames(Nper.c04); Nper.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(Nper.c04) <- NULL
Nper.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t05)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c05$term <- rownames(Nper.c05); Nper.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(Nper.c05) <- NULL
Nper.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t06)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c06$term <- rownames(Nper.c06); Nper.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(Nper.c06) <- NULL
Nper.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t07)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c07$term <- rownames(Nper.c07); Nper.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(Nper.c07) <- NULL
Nper.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t08)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c08$term <- rownames(Nper.c08); Nper.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(Nper.c08) <- NULL
Nper.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t09)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c09$term <- rownames(Nper.c09); Nper.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(Nper.c09) <- NULL
Nper.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t10)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c10$term <- rownames(Nper.c10); Nper.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(Nper.c10) <- NULL
Nper.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t11)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c11$term <- rownames(Nper.c11); Nper.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(Nper.c11) <- NULL
Nper.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t12)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c12$term <- rownames(Nper.c12); Nper.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(Nper.c12) <- NULL
Nper.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t13)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c13$term <- rownames(Nper.c13); Nper.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(Nper.c13) <- NULL
Nper.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t14)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c14$term <- rownames(Nper.c14); Nper.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(Nper.c14) <- NULL
Nper.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t15)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c15$term <- rownames(Nper.c15); Nper.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(Nper.c15) <- NULL
Nper.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t16)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c16$term <- rownames(Nper.c16); Nper.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(Nper.c16) <- NULL
Nper.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t17)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c17$term <- rownames(Nper.c17); Nper.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(Nper.c17) <- NULL
Nper.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nper.t18)$coefficients$cond); Nper.c18$term <- rownames(Nper.c18); Nper.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(Nper.c18) <- NULL

Nper.coefs_all <- bind_rows(
  Nper.c00, Nper.c01, Nper.c02, Nper.c03, Nper.c04, Nper.c05, Nper.c06, Nper.c07, Nper.c08, Nper.c09,
  Nper.c10, Nper.c11, Nper.c12, Nper.c13, Nper.c14, Nper.c15, Nper.c16, Nper.c17, Nper.c18
) %>%
  rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

Nper.full_table <- left_join(Nper.coefs_all, Nper.aicc, by = "model") %>%
  arrange(AICc, model, term)

# ---- Table S1-style wide block ----
Nper.aicc_unique <- Nper.full_table %>%
  select(model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(AICc)

Nper.coef_wide <- Nper.full_table %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se) %>%
  mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  select(model, term, est_se)

Nper.coef_wide$term <- dplyr::recode(Nper.coef_wide$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "Distance_m" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m" = "Soil×Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Years",
  "Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance×Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Distance×Years"
)

Nper.coef_wide2 <- Nper.coef_wide %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

Nper.TableS1 <- Nper.aicc_unique %>%
  left_join(Nper.coef_wide2, by = "model") %>%
  mutate(Response = "N.per") %>%
  select(
    Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional,
    Intercept, `Soil (Granite)`, Distance, `Years postmortem`,
    `Soil×Distance`, `Soil×Years`, `Distance×Years`, `Soil×Distance×Years`
  )

Nper.TableS1


```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model Nper


set.seed(1)

# Additive model diagnostics (Nper.t07)
res_Nper_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Nper.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_Nper_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_Nper_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_Nper_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_Nper_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (Nper.t18)
res_Nper_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Nper.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_Nper_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_Nper_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_Nper_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_Nper_full)        # outlier check



### Step 3) check top model ###

# Top model: S:D + S:A (Nper.t14)
set.seed(1)
res_nper_top <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Nper.t14, n = 1000)
plot(res_nper_top)
testUniformity(res_nper_top)
testDispersion(res_nper_top)
testOutliers(res_nper_top)





```

#### Plotting - Fig 1e

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 1d Nper
### Step 4) N.per — prediction grid + plot for TOP MODEL (Nper.t14 = S:D + S:A) ###

dist_seq <- seq(min(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

# hold age at median on the CENTERED YEARS scale used in the model
age_med <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol$age_years_centered, probs = 0.50, na.rm = TRUE))

# hold year_sampled at most frequent level (required for predict)
yr_ref <- names(sort(table(chem_fol$year_sampled), decreasing = TRUE))[1]

pred_grid_nper <- expand.grid(
  Distance_m   = dist_seq,
  soil_type    = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)),
  year_sampled = yr_ref
)

pred_grid_nper$age_years_centered <- age_med
pred_grid_nper$soil_type <- factor(pred_grid_nper$soil_type, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)))
pred_grid_nper$year_sampled <- factor(pred_grid_nper$year_sampled, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)))

p_link_nper <- predict(Nper.t14, newdata = pred_grid_nper, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_nper$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link_nper$fit)
pred_grid_nper$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link_nper$se.fit)

pred_grid_nper$fit   <- exp(pred_grid_nper$fit_link)
pred_grid_nper$lower <- exp(pred_grid_nper$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_nper$se_link)
pred_grid_nper$upper <- exp(pred_grid_nper$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_nper$se_link)

# points dataframe (no filtering here; this is the "shitty" graph)
chem_fol_plot <- chem_fol

soil_cols <- c(
  "Basalt"  = "#D94801",  # orange
  "Granite" = "#984EA3"   # purple
)

ggplot(pred_grid_nper, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = soil_type, fill = soil_type)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = N.per),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)   # horiz jitter only
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = soil_type), alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = soil_cols, name = "Soil type") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = soil_cols, name = "Soil type") +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab("Predicted soil N (%)")

```

```{r}
#| label: clean Figure-1e-Nper

gap_lo <- 0.20
gap_hi <- 0.25
top_comp <- 0.12

# plotting-only: remove points in the removed window so ggbreak can't "slice" them
chem_fol_plot <- subset(chem_fol, N.per <= gap_lo | N.per >= gap_hi)

p <- ggplot(pred_grid_nper, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = soil_type, fill = soil_type)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = N.per),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)   # horiz jitter only
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = soil_type),
              alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  scale_color_manual(values = soil_cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = soil_cols) +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +

  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab("Soil N (%)") +

  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 10),

    # kill right-side axis text/ticks/title AND the line/spine
    axis.text.y.right  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y.right  = element_blank(),

    panel.border = element_blank() )+

  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 0.10, 0.15, 0.20, 0.40, 0.80, 1.20))
                     

# apply break:
# start at gap_lo + 0.01 so gap_lo belongs only to the lower segment
p2 <- p + scale_y_break(c(gap_lo + 0.000001, gap_hi), scales = top_comp)

p2


```

### N15

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm N15 AICc selection N15
# -------------------------
# Prep
# -------------------------
chem_fol$site         <- factor(chem_fol$site)
chem_fol$soil_type    <- factor(chem_fol$soil_type)
chem_fol$year_sampled <- factor(chem_fol$year_sampled, levels = sort(unique(chem_fol$year_sampled)))

chem_fol$age_years <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25
chem_fol$age_years_centered <- chem_fol$age_years - mean(chem_fol$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

# -------------------------
# Step 1) Fit 19 hierarchical models (up to 3-way) — Gaussian
# -------------------------
N15g.t00 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t01 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t02 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t03 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t04 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t05 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t06 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t07 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t08 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t09 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t10 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t11 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t12 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + Distance_m + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t13 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t14 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t15 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:Distance_m + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t16 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t17 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15g.t18 <- glmmTMB(N15 ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)


# -------------------------
# Step 2) Model table: AICc / delta / weight + R2, then coef ± SE
# -------------------------
N15g.aicc <- data.frame(
  model = c(
    "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
  ),
  AICc = c(
    AICc(N15g.t00), AICc(N15g.t01), AICc(N15g.t02), AICc(N15g.t03), AICc(N15g.t04),
    AICc(N15g.t05), AICc(N15g.t06), AICc(N15g.t07), AICc(N15g.t08), AICc(N15g.t09),
    AICc(N15g.t10), AICc(N15g.t11), AICc(N15g.t12), AICc(N15g.t13), AICc(N15g.t14),
    AICc(N15g.t15), AICc(N15g.t16), AICc(N15g.t17), AICc(N15g.t18)
  )
)

N15g.aicc$deltaAICc <- N15g.aicc$AICc - min(N15g.aicc$AICc)
N15g.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * N15g.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * N15g.aicc$deltaAICc))

N15g.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(N15g.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15g.t18)$R2_marginal
)

N15g.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(N15g.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15g.t18)$R2_conditional
)

N15g.aicc <- N15g.aicc[order(N15g.aicc$AICc), ]
N15g.aicc  # <-- top model is first row

# ---- coefficients ± SE (long) ----
N15g.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t00)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c00$term <- rownames(N15g.c00); N15g.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(N15g.c00) <- NULL
N15g.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t01)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c01$term <- rownames(N15g.c01); N15g.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(N15g.c01) <- NULL
N15g.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t02)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c02$term <- rownames(N15g.c02); N15g.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(N15g.c02) <- NULL
N15g.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t03)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c03$term <- rownames(N15g.c03); N15g.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(N15g.c03) <- NULL
N15g.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t04)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c04$term <- rownames(N15g.c04); N15g.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(N15g.c04) <- NULL
N15g.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t05)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c05$term <- rownames(N15g.c05); N15g.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(N15g.c05) <- NULL
N15g.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t06)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c06$term <- rownames(N15g.c06); N15g.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(N15g.c06) <- NULL
N15g.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t07)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c07$term <- rownames(N15g.c07); N15g.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(N15g.c07) <- NULL
N15g.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t08)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c08$term <- rownames(N15g.c08); N15g.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(N15g.c08) <- NULL
N15g.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t09)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c09$term <- rownames(N15g.c09); N15g.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(N15g.c09) <- NULL
N15g.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t10)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c10$term <- rownames(N15g.c10); N15g.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(N15g.c10) <- NULL
N15g.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t11)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c11$term <- rownames(N15g.c11); N15g.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(N15g.c11) <- NULL
N15g.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t12)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c12$term <- rownames(N15g.c12); N15g.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(N15g.c12) <- NULL
N15g.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t13)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c13$term <- rownames(N15g.c13); N15g.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(N15g.c13) <- NULL
N15g.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t14)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c14$term <- rownames(N15g.c14); N15g.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(N15g.c14) <- NULL
N15g.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t15)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c15$term <- rownames(N15g.c15); N15g.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(N15g.c15) <- NULL
N15g.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t16)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c16$term <- rownames(N15g.c16); N15g.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(N15g.c16) <- NULL
N15g.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t17)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c17$term <- rownames(N15g.c17); N15g.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(N15g.c17) <- NULL
N15g.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15g.t18)$coefficients$cond); N15g.c18$term <- rownames(N15g.c18); N15g.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(N15g.c18) <- NULL

N15g.coefs_all <- bind_rows(
  N15g.c00, N15g.c01, N15g.c02, N15g.c03, N15g.c04, N15g.c05, N15g.c06, N15g.c07, N15g.c08, N15g.c09,
  N15g.c10, N15g.c11, N15g.c12, N15g.c13, N15g.c14, N15g.c15, N15g.c16, N15g.c17, N15g.c18
) %>%
  rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

N15g.full_table <- left_join(N15g.coefs_all, N15g.aicc, by = "model") %>%
  arrange(AICc, model, term)

# ---- Table S1-style wide block ----

N15g.aicc_unique <- N15g.full_table %>%
  select(model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(AICc)

N15g.coef_wide <- N15g.full_table %>%
  select(model, term, estimate, se) %>%
  mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  select(model, term, est_se)

N15g.coef_wide$term <- dplyr::recode(N15g.coef_wide$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "year_sampled2025" = "Year (2025)",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "Distance_m" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m" = "Soil×Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Years",
  "Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance×Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Distance×Years"
)

N15g.coef_wide2 <- N15g.coef_wide %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

N15g.TableS1 <- N15g.aicc_unique %>%
  left_join(N15g.coef_wide2, by = "model") %>%
  mutate(Response = "N15") %>%
  select(
    Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional,
    Intercept, `Year (2025)`, `Soil (Granite)`, Distance, `Years postmortem`,
    `Soil×Distance`, `Soil×Years`, `Distance×Years`, `Soil×Distance×Years`
  )

N15g.TableS1


```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model N15

set.seed(1)

# Additive model diagnostics (N15g.t07)
res_N15g_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = N15g.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_N15g_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_N15g_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_N15g_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_N15g_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (N15g.t18)
res_N15g_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = N15g.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_N15g_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_N15g_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_N15g_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_N15g_full)        # outlier check




### Step 3) DHARMa residual diagnostics for top N15 Gaussian model (N15g.t18 = 3-way) ###

set.seed(1)
res_n15g <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = N15g.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_n15g)
testUniformity(res_n15g)
testDispersion(res_n15g)
testOutliers(res_n15g)


```

#### Plotting - Fig 1f

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 1d N15

### N15 — prediction grid + plot (Gaussian mean model; full data) for TOP MODEL (N15g.t18 = 3-way) ###

# 1) pick 3 representative ages (10th, 50th, 90th percentile) on original scale (age_days)
age_q10_days <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol$age_days, probs = 0.10, na.rm = TRUE))
age_q50_days <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol$age_days, probs = 0.50, na.rm = TRUE))
age_q90_days <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol$age_days, probs = 0.90, na.rm = TRUE))

# convert those ages to YEARS, then center using the SAME centering as your model workflow
age_mean_years <- mean(chem_fol$age_days / 365.25, na.rm = TRUE)

age_q10_cy <- (age_q10_days / 365.25) - age_mean_years
age_q50_cy <- (age_q50_days / 365.25) - age_mean_years
age_q90_cy <- (age_q90_days / 365.25) - age_mean_years

# 2) prediction grid (distance sequence)
dist_seq <- seq(min(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chem_fol$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

pred_grid_n15 <- expand.grid(
  Distance_m = dist_seq,
  soil_type  = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)),
  year_sampled = levels(factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)),   # required for predict()
  age_group  = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)")
)

# map age_group to centered-years values
pred_grid_n15$age_years_centered <-
  ifelse(pred_grid_n15$age_group == "Young (p10)", age_q10_cy,
  ifelse(pred_grid_n15$age_group == "Mid (p50)",   age_q50_cy, age_q90_cy))

pred_grid_n15$soil_type    <- factor(pred_grid_n15$soil_type, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$soil_type)))
pred_grid_n15$year_sampled <- factor(pred_grid_n15$year_sampled, levels = levels(factor(chem_fol$year_sampled)))
pred_grid_n15$age_group    <- factor(pred_grid_n15$age_group, levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))

# 3) predict on response scale with SE (Gaussian)
p_resp_n15 <- predict(N15g.t18, newdata = pred_grid_n15,
                      type = "response", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_n15$fit <- as.numeric(p_resp_n15$fit)
pred_grid_n15$se  <- as.numeric(p_resp_n15$se.fit)

pred_grid_n15$lower <- pred_grid_n15$fit - 1.96 * pred_grid_n15$se
pred_grid_n15$upper <- pred_grid_n15$fit + 1.96 * pred_grid_n15$se

# combine years for plotting only (mean across years)
pred_grid_n15_plot <- pred_grid_n15 %>%
  group_by(Distance_m, soil_type, age_group) %>%
  summarise(
    fit   = mean(fit, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = mean(lower, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper = mean(upper, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# points (raw data): assign each observation to p10/p50/p90 group based on age_days cutpoints
chem_fol$age_group_pts <- ifelse(chem_fol$age_days <= age_q10_days, "Young (p10)",
                         ifelse(chem_fol$age_days >= age_q90_days, "Old (p90)", "Mid (p50)"))
chem_fol$age_group_pts <- factor(chem_fol$age_group_pts, levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))

cb_cols <- c(
  "Young (p10)" = "#0072B2",
  "Mid (p50)"   = "#E69F00",
  "Old (p90)"   = "#009E73"
)

ggplot(pred_grid_n15_plot, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  # POINTS FIRST = BEHIND
  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = N15),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)   # horiz jitter only
  ) +

  # then ribbon + line
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group), alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  facet_wrap(~ soil_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +

  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab(expression(delta^{15}*N~("\u2030")))

```

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 1d N15 final

gap_lo <- 17   
gap_hi <- 20    
top_comp <- 0.12

# plotting-only: remove points in the removed window so ggbreak can't "slice" them
chem_fol_plot <- subset(chem_fol, N15 <= gap_lo | N15 >= gap_hi)

p <- ggplot(pred_grid_n15_plot, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  # points BEHIND
  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = N15),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey50",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)   # horiz jitter only
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group),
              alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  facet_wrap(~ soil_type) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +

  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ylab(expression(delta^{15}*N~("\u2030"))) +

  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 10),

    # kill right-side axis text/ticks/title AND the line/spine
    axis.text.y.right  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.right = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y.right  = element_blank(),

    panel.border = element_blank()
  
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30,35))

# start at gap_lo + tiny epsilon so gap_lo belongs only to the lower segment
p2 <- p + scale_y_break(c(gap_lo + 1e-6, gap_hi), scales = top_comp)

p2

```

### N15_fol

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm N15  AICc selection N15fol
# -------------------------
# Prep
# -------------------------
chem_fol$site         <- factor(chem_fol$site)
chem_fol$soil_type    <- factor(chem_fol$soil_type)
chem_fol$year_sampled <- factor(chem_fol$year_sampled, levels = sort(unique(chem_fol$year_sampled)))

chem_fol$age_years <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25
chem_fol$age_years_centered <- chem_fol$age_years - mean(chem_fol$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

# -------------------------
# Step 1) Fit 19 hierarchical models (up to 3-way) — Gaussian
# Response = N15_fol
# -------------------------
N15folg.t00 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t01 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t02 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t03 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t04 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t05 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t06 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t07 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t08 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t09 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t10 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t11 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t12 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + Distance_m + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t13 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t14 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                         soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t15 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                         soil_type:Distance_m + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t16 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                         soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t17 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                         soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

N15folg.t18 <- glmmTMB(N15_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = gaussian(), data = chem_fol)

# -------------------------
# Step 2) Model table: AICc / delta / weight + R2, then coef ± SE
# (for foliar N15: models N15folg.t00 ... N15folg.t18)
# -------------------------

N15folg.aicc <- data.frame(
  model = c(
    "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
  ),
  AICc = c(
    AICc(N15folg.t00), AICc(N15folg.t01), AICc(N15folg.t02), AICc(N15folg.t03), AICc(N15folg.t04),
    AICc(N15folg.t05), AICc(N15folg.t06), AICc(N15folg.t07), AICc(N15folg.t08), AICc(N15folg.t09),
    AICc(N15folg.t10), AICc(N15folg.t11), AICc(N15folg.t12), AICc(N15folg.t13), AICc(N15folg.t14),
    AICc(N15folg.t15), AICc(N15folg.t16), AICc(N15folg.t17), AICc(N15folg.t18)
  )
)

N15folg.aicc$deltaAICc <- N15folg.aicc$AICc - min(N15folg.aicc$AICc)
N15folg.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * N15folg.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * N15folg.aicc$deltaAICc))

# R2 (Nakagawa): marginal + conditional
N15folg.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(N15folg.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t18)$R2_marginal
)

N15folg.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(N15folg.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(N15folg.t18)$R2_conditional
)

N15folg.aicc <- N15folg.aicc[order(N15folg.aicc$AICc), ]
N15folg.aicc  # <-- top model is first row


# ---- coefficients ± SE (long) ----
N15folg.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t00)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c00$term <- rownames(N15folg.c00); N15folg.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(N15folg.c00) <- NULL
N15folg.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t01)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c01$term <- rownames(N15folg.c01); N15folg.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(N15folg.c01) <- NULL
N15folg.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t02)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c02$term <- rownames(N15folg.c02); N15folg.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(N15folg.c02) <- NULL
N15folg.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t03)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c03$term <- rownames(N15folg.c03); N15folg.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(N15folg.c03) <- NULL
N15folg.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t04)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c04$term <- rownames(N15folg.c04); N15folg.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(N15folg.c04) <- NULL
N15folg.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t05)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c05$term <- rownames(N15folg.c05); N15folg.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(N15folg.c05) <- NULL
N15folg.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t06)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c06$term <- rownames(N15folg.c06); N15folg.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(N15folg.c06) <- NULL
N15folg.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t07)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c07$term <- rownames(N15folg.c07); N15folg.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(N15folg.c07) <- NULL
N15folg.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t08)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c08$term <- rownames(N15folg.c08); N15folg.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(N15folg.c08) <- NULL
N15folg.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t09)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c09$term <- rownames(N15folg.c09); N15folg.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(N15folg.c09) <- NULL
N15folg.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t10)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c10$term <- rownames(N15folg.c10); N15folg.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(N15folg.c10) <- NULL
N15folg.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t11)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c11$term <- rownames(N15folg.c11); N15folg.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(N15folg.c11) <- NULL
N15folg.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t12)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c12$term <- rownames(N15folg.c12); N15folg.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(N15folg.c12) <- NULL
N15folg.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t13)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c13$term <- rownames(N15folg.c13); N15folg.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(N15folg.c13) <- NULL
N15folg.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t14)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c14$term <- rownames(N15folg.c14); N15folg.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(N15folg.c14) <- NULL
N15folg.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t15)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c15$term <- rownames(N15folg.c15); N15folg.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(N15folg.c15) <- NULL
N15folg.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t16)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c16$term <- rownames(N15folg.c16); N15folg.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(N15folg.c16) <- NULL
N15folg.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t17)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c17$term <- rownames(N15folg.c17); N15folg.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(N15folg.c17) <- NULL
N15folg.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(N15folg.t18)$coefficients$cond); N15folg.c18$term <- rownames(N15folg.c18); N15folg.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(N15folg.c18) <- NULL

N15folg.coefs_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  N15folg.c00, N15folg.c01, N15folg.c02, N15folg.c03, N15folg.c04, N15folg.c05, N15folg.c06, N15folg.c07,
  N15folg.c08, N15folg.c09, N15folg.c10, N15folg.c11, N15folg.c12, N15folg.c13, N15folg.c14, N15folg.c15,
  N15folg.c16, N15folg.c17, N15folg.c18
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, estimate, se)

N15folg.full_table <- dplyr::left_join(N15folg.coefs_all, N15folg.aicc, by = "model") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc, model, term)


# ---- Table S1-style wide block ----
N15folg.aicc_unique <- N15folg.full_table %>%
  dplyr::select(model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

N15folg.coef_wide <- N15folg.full_table %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, estimate, se) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, est_se)

N15folg.coef_wide$term <- dplyr::recode(N15folg.coef_wide$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "year_sampled2025" = "Year (2025)",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "Distance_m" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m" = "Soil×Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Years",
  "Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance×Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Distance×Years"
)

N15folg.coef_wide2 <- tidyr::pivot_wider(N15folg.coef_wide, names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

N15folg.TableS1 <- N15folg.aicc_unique %>%
  dplyr::left_join(N15folg.coef_wide2, by = "model") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Response = "N15_fol") %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional,
    Intercept, `Year (2025)`, `Soil (Granite)`, Distance, `Years postmortem`,
    `Soil×Distance`, `Soil×Years`, `Distance×Years`, `Soil×Distance×Years`
  )

N15folg.TableS1
```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model N15fol
# Additive model diagnostics (N15g.t07)
res_N15folg_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = N15folg.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_N15folg_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_N15folg_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_N15folg_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_N15folg_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (N15g.t17)
res_N15folg_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = N15folg.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_N15folg_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_N15folg_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_N15folg_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_N15folg_full)        # outlier check






### Step 3) DHARMa residual diagnostics — foliar N% top model (N15folg.t10= dis) ###

set.seed(1)
res_nperfol <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = N15folg.t10, n = 1000)

plot(res_nperfol)
testUniformity(res_nperfol)
testDispersion(res_nperfol)
testOutliers(res_nperfol)



```

#### Plotting - Fig 1g

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 1d N15fol

### 1 panel, points + fitted line(s) + 95% CI; year fixed to 2025; x breaks 0/5/10/15 ###

# points df (safe)
chem_fol_plot <- subset(
  chem_fol,
  !is.na(N15_fol) & !is.na(Distance_m) & !is.na(year_sampled) & !is.na(age_years_centered)
)

# pick 3 representative ages (p10/p50/p90) on centered-years scale
age_sc_q10 <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.10, na.rm = TRUE))
age_sc_q50 <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.50, na.rm = TRUE))
age_sc_q90 <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.90, na.rm = TRUE))

# prediction grid (distance range)
dist_seq <- seq(min(chem_fol_plot$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chem_fol_plot$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

pred_grid_n15fol <- expand.grid(
  Distance_m = dist_seq,
  age_group = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)")
)

pred_grid_n15fol$age_years_centered <- ifelse(pred_grid_n15fol$age_group == "Young (p10)", age_sc_q10,
                                      ifelse(pred_grid_n15fol$age_group == "Mid (p50)",  age_sc_q50, age_sc_q90))

# FIX year for prediction (use 2025; if only one level exists, this still works)
pred_grid_n15fol$year_sampled <- factor("2025", levels = levels(chem_fol_plot$year_sampled))
pred_grid_n15fol$age_group <- factor(pred_grid_n15fol$age_group, levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))

# predict on response scale with SE (Gaussian identity)
p_resp <- predict(N15folg.t10, newdata = pred_grid_n15fol, type = "response", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_n15fol$fit   <- as.numeric(p_resp$fit)
pred_grid_n15fol$se    <- as.numeric(p_resp$se.fit)
pred_grid_n15fol$lower <- pred_grid_n15fol$fit - 1.96 * pred_grid_n15fol$se
pred_grid_n15fol$upper <- pred_grid_n15fol$fit + 1.96 * pred_grid_n15fol$se

# Okabe–Ito palette (colorblind-safe)
cb_cols <- c(
  "Young (p10)" = "#0072B2",
  "Mid (p50)"   = "#E69F00",
  "Old (p90)"   = "#009E73"
)


ggplot(pred_grid_n15fol, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = N15_fol),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey55",
    alpha = 0.40,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group),
              alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols, name = "Years postmortem") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols, name = "Years postmortem") +
  guides(fill = "none") +

  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15)) +
  ylab(expression(delta^{15}*N~("\u2030")))
```

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 1g foliar N15 final

# points df (safe)
chem_fol_plot <- subset(
  chem_fol,
  !is.na(N15_fol) & !is.na(Distance_m) & !is.na(year_sampled) & !is.na(age_years_centered)
)

# pick 3 representative ages (p10/p50/p90) on centered-years scale
age_sc_q10 <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.10, na.rm = TRUE))
age_sc_q50 <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.50, na.rm = TRUE))
age_sc_q90 <- as.numeric(quantile(chem_fol_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.90, na.rm = TRUE))

# prediction grid (distance range)
dist_seq <- seq(min(chem_fol_plot$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chem_fol_plot$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

pred_grid_n15fol <- expand.grid(
  Distance_m = dist_seq,
  age_group  = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)")
)

pred_grid_n15fol$age_years_centered <- ifelse(pred_grid_n15fol$age_group == "Young (p10)", age_sc_q10,
                                      ifelse(pred_grid_n15fol$age_group == "Mid (p50)",  age_sc_q50, age_sc_q90))

# FIX year for prediction (use 2025 if it exists, otherwise use the first available level)
yr_levels <- levels(factor(chem_fol_plot$year_sampled))
yr_use <- if ("2025" %in% yr_levels) "2025" else yr_levels[1]
pred_grid_n15fol$year_sampled <- factor(yr_use, levels = yr_levels)

pred_grid_n15fol$age_group <- factor(pred_grid_n15fol$age_group,
                                     levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))

# predict on response scale with SE (Gaussian identity)
p_resp <- predict(N15folg.t10, newdata = pred_grid_n15fol,
                  type = "response", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_n15fol$fit   <- as.numeric(p_resp$fit)
pred_grid_n15fol$se    <- as.numeric(p_resp$se.fit)
pred_grid_n15fol$lower <- pred_grid_n15fol$fit - 1.96 * pred_grid_n15fol$se
pred_grid_n15fol$upper <- pred_grid_n15fol$fit + 1.96 * pred_grid_n15fol$se

# Okabe–Ito palette (colorblind-safe)
cb_cols <- c(
  "Young (p10)" = "#0072B2",
  "Mid (p50)"   = "#E69F00",
  "Old (p90)"   = "#009E73"
)

ggplot(pred_grid_n15fol, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  # points BEHIND
  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = N15_fol),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey55",
    alpha = 0.40,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group),
              alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  # <- colors + NO legend title ("years box thing" gone)
  scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols, name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols,  name = NULL) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15)) +
  ylab(expression(delta^{15}*N~("\u2030")))
```

### N.per_fol

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm AICc selection Nperfol
### N.per_fol — STEPS 1–2 (STANDARD 19-model set only; year_sampled + (1|site) in all) ###

# -------------------------
# Prep 
# -------------------------
chem_fol$site         <- factor(chem_fol$site)
chem_fol$soil_type    <- factor(chem_fol$soil_type)
chem_fol$year_sampled <- factor(chem_fol$year_sampled, levels = sort(unique(chem_fol$year_sampled)))

# NEW standard: centered years (not scaled days)
chem_fol$age_years_centered <- (chem_fol$age_days - mean(chem_fol$age_days, na.rm = TRUE)) / 365.25


# -------------------------
# Step 1) Fit 19 hierarchical models (up to 3-way)
# Family: Gamma(log)
# -------------------------
Nperfol.t00 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t01 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t02 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t03 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t04 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t05 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t06 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t07 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t08 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t09 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t10 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t11 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t12 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + Distance_m + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t13 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t14 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                         soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t15 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                         soil_type:Distance_m + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t16 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                         soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t17 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                         soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)

Nperfol.t18 <- glmmTMB(N.per_fol ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                       family = Gamma(link="log"), data = chem_fol)


# -------------------------
# Step 2) Model table: AICc / delta / weight + R2, then coef ± SE
# -------------------------
Nperfol.aicc <- data.frame(
  model = c(
    "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
  ),
  AICc = c(
    AICc(Nperfol.t00), AICc(Nperfol.t01), AICc(Nperfol.t02), AICc(Nperfol.t03), AICc(Nperfol.t04),
    AICc(Nperfol.t05), AICc(Nperfol.t06), AICc(Nperfol.t07), AICc(Nperfol.t08), AICc(Nperfol.t09),
    AICc(Nperfol.t10), AICc(Nperfol.t11), AICc(Nperfol.t12), AICc(Nperfol.t13), AICc(Nperfol.t14),
    AICc(Nperfol.t15), AICc(Nperfol.t16), AICc(Nperfol.t17), AICc(Nperfol.t18)
  )
)

Nperfol.aicc$deltaAICc <- Nperfol.aicc$AICc - min(Nperfol.aicc$AICc)
Nperfol.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * Nperfol.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * Nperfol.aicc$deltaAICc))

# R2 (Nakagawa): marginal + conditional
Nperfol.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t18)$R2_marginal
)

Nperfol.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Nperfol.t18)$R2_conditional
)

Nperfol.aicc <- Nperfol.aicc[order(Nperfol.aicc$AICc), ]
Nperfol.aicc  # <-- top model is first row


# ---- coefficients ± SE (long) ----
Nperfol.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t00)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c00$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c00); Nperfol.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(Nperfol.c00) <- NULL
Nperfol.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t01)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c01$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c01); Nperfol.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(Nperfol.c01) <- NULL
Nperfol.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t02)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c02$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c02); Nperfol.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(Nperfol.c02) <- NULL
Nperfol.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t03)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c03$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c03); Nperfol.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(Nperfol.c03) <- NULL
Nperfol.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t04)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c04$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c04); Nperfol.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(Nperfol.c04) <- NULL
Nperfol.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t05)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c05$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c05); Nperfol.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(Nperfol.c05) <- NULL
Nperfol.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t06)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c06$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c06); Nperfol.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(Nperfol.c06) <- NULL
Nperfol.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t07)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c07$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c07); Nperfol.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(Nperfol.c07) <- NULL
Nperfol.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t08)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c08$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c08); Nperfol.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(Nperfol.c08) <- NULL
Nperfol.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t09)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c09$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c09); Nperfol.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(Nperfol.c09) <- NULL
Nperfol.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t10)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c10$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c10); Nperfol.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(Nperfol.c10) <- NULL
Nperfol.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t11)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c11$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c11); Nperfol.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(Nperfol.c11) <- NULL
Nperfol.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t12)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c12$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c12); Nperfol.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(Nperfol.c12) <- NULL
Nperfol.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t13)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c13$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c13); Nperfol.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(Nperfol.c13) <- NULL
Nperfol.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t14)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c14$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c14); Nperfol.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(Nperfol.c14) <- NULL
Nperfol.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t15)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c15$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c15); Nperfol.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(Nperfol.c15) <- NULL
Nperfol.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t16)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c16$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c16); Nperfol.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(Nperfol.c16) <- NULL
Nperfol.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t17)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c17$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c17); Nperfol.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(Nperfol.c17) <- NULL
Nperfol.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(Nperfol.t18)$coefficients$cond); Nperfol.c18$term <- rownames(Nperfol.c18); Nperfol.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(Nperfol.c18) <- NULL

Nperfol.coefs_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  Nperfol.c00, Nperfol.c01, Nperfol.c02, Nperfol.c03, Nperfol.c04, Nperfol.c05, Nperfol.c06, Nperfol.c07,
  Nperfol.c08, Nperfol.c09, Nperfol.c10, Nperfol.c11, Nperfol.c12, Nperfol.c13, Nperfol.c14, Nperfol.c15,
  Nperfol.c16, Nperfol.c17, Nperfol.c18
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

Nperfol.full_table <- dplyr::left_join(Nperfol.coefs_all, Nperfol.aicc, by = "model") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc, model, term)


# ---- Table S1-style wide block ----
Nperfol.aicc_unique <- Nperfol.full_table %>%
  dplyr::select(model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

Nperfol.coef_wide <- Nperfol.full_table %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, estimate, se) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, est_se)

Nperfol.coef_wide$term <- dplyr::recode(Nperfol.coef_wide$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "year_sampled2025" = "Year (2025)",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "Distance_m" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m" = "Soil×Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Years",
  "Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance×Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Distance×Years"
)

Nperfol.coef_wide2 <- tidyr::pivot_wider(Nperfol.coef_wide, names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

Nperfol.TableS1 <- Nperfol.aicc_unique %>%
  dplyr::left_join(Nperfol.coef_wide2, by = "model") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Response = "N.per_fol") %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional,
    Intercept, `Year (2025)`, `Soil (Granite)`, Distance, `Years postmortem`,
    `Soil×Distance`, `Soil×Years`, `Distance×Years`, `Soil×Distance×Years`
  )

Nperfol.TableS1
```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model Nperfol

set.seed(1)

# Additive model diagnostics (Nperfol.t07)
res_Nperfol_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Nperfol.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_Nperfol_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_Nperfol_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_Nperfol_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_Nperfol_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (Nperfol.t17)
res_Nperfol_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Nperfol.t17, n = 1000)

plot(res_Nperfol_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_Nperfol_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_Nperfol_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_Nperfol_full)        # outlier check


### Step 3) DHARMa residual diagnostics — foliar δ15N top model (N15fol.t10 = dis * age) ###

set.seed(1)
res_Nperfol.t02 <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Nperfol.t02, n = 1000)

plot(res_Nperfol.t02)
testUniformity(res_Nperfol.t02)
testDispersion(res_Nperfol.t02)
testOutliers(res_Nperfol.t02)


```

#### Plotting - Fig 1h

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 1d Nperfol

### N.per_fol — distance-only plot for Nperfol.t02 (chem_fol) ###

# points df (check)
chem_fol_plot <- subset(chem_fol, !is.na(N.per_fol) & !is.na(Distance_m) & !is.na(year_sampled))

# prediction grid (distance range)
dist_seq <- seq(min(chem_fol_plot$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(chem_fol_plot$Distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

pred_grid_nperfol <- data.frame(
  Distance_m = dist_seq,
  year_sampled = factor("2025", levels = levels(factor(chem_fol_plot$year_sampled)))
)

# predict on link scale with SE, then back-transform (Gamma log)
p_link_nperfol <- predict(Nperfol.t02, newdata = pred_grid_nperfol,
                          type = "link", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_nperfol$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link_nperfol$fit)
pred_grid_nperfol$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link_nperfol$se.fit)

pred_grid_nperfol$fit   <- exp(pred_grid_nperfol$fit_link)
pred_grid_nperfol$lower <- exp(pred_grid_nperfol$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_nperfol$se_link)
pred_grid_nperfol$upper <- exp(pred_grid_nperfol$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_nperfol$se_link)

ggplot(pred_grid_nperfol, aes(x = Distance_m, y = fit)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  geom_point(
    data = chem_fol_plot,
    aes(x = Distance_m, y = N.per_fol),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey55",
    alpha = 0.40,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
              fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.35, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.1) +

  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15)) +
  ylab("Foliar N (%)")
```

### All other nutrients (SO4, HNO3, Ca, Mg, K, Na, Cl, Fe, Mn, Cu, Zn, B, pH)

```{r}
#| label: all other nutrients glmm AIC 

### --- ONE-SWOOP supplemental tables for "other nutrients"  ---
### NOTE - this chunk was written by ChatGPT, NOT by the authors. I provided my hard coded outline (see above chunks) to ChatGPT and asked it to write a loop for the remaining soil nutrients. I checked its work afterwards and the output.

# ============================================
# LOOP: 19-model AICc + R2 + coef table
# UPDATED: (1) always includes + year_sampled
#          (2) uses Years postmortem (age_years_centered), NOT days_postmortem_sc
# ============================================

responses <- c(
  "SO4_mgkg","NO3_mgkg","HCO3_mgkg","Ca_mgkg","Mg_mgkg","K_mgkg","Na_mgkg","Cl_mgkg",
  "Fe_mgkg","Mn_mgkg","Cu_mgkg","Zn_mgkg","B_mgkg","pH"
)

# -------------------------
# Prep (once)
# -------------------------
chem_fol$site         <- factor(chem_fol$site)
chem_fol$soil_type    <- factor(chem_fol$soil_type)
chem_fol$year_sampled <- factor(chem_fol$year_sampled, levels = sort(unique(chem_fol$year_sampled)))

chem_fol$age_years <- chem_fol$age_days / 365.25
chem_fol$age_years_centered <- chem_fol$age_years - mean(chem_fol$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

halfDL_mgkg <- 0.01  # Reed-style half-DL after conversion to mg/kg for 1:2 water extracts

all_tables <- list()
all_aicc   <- list()

for (resp in responses) {

  dat <- chem_fol

  # response + family
  if (resp == "pH") {
    dat$y_tmp <- dat[[resp]]
    fam <- gaussian()
    link_type <- "gaussian"
  } else {
    dat$y_tmp <- ifelse(is.na(dat[[resp]]), NA,
                        ifelse(dat[[resp]] <= 0, halfDL_mgkg, dat[[resp]]))
    fam <- Gamma(link = "log")
    link_type <- "gamma_log"
  }

  # drop rows missing any required fields (keeps models consistent)
  dat <- dat[!is.na(dat$y_tmp) &
               !is.na(dat$Distance_m) &
               !is.na(dat$soil_type) &
               !is.na(dat$year_sampled) &
               !is.na(dat$age_years_centered) &
               !is.na(dat$site), ]

  # ----- Fit 19 models (ALL include year_sampled + (1|site)) -----
  m00 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m01 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m02 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m03 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m04 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m05 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m06 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m07 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)

  m08 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m09 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m10 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)

  m11 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m12 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + Distance_m + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)
  m13 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + Distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)

  m14 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                   soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)

  m15 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                   soil_type:Distance_m + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)

  m16 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                   soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)

  m17 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type + Distance_m + age_years_centered +
                   soil_type:Distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + Distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)

  m18 <- glmmTMB(y_tmp ~ year_sampled + soil_type * Distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site), family = fam, data = dat)

  mods <- list(m00,m01,m02,m03,m04,m05,m06,m07,m08,m09,m10,m11,m12,m13,m14,m15,m16,m17,m18)
  mod_names <- c(
    "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
  )

  # ----- AICc table -----
  aicc <- data.frame(
    Response = resp,
    model = mod_names,
    family_used = link_type,
    AICc = c(
      AICc(m00),AICc(m01),AICc(m02),AICc(m03),AICc(m04),AICc(m05),AICc(m06),AICc(m07),AICc(m08),AICc(m09),
      AICc(m10),AICc(m11),AICc(m12),AICc(m13),AICc(m14),AICc(m15),AICc(m16),AICc(m17),AICc(m18)
    )
  )
  aicc$deltaAICc <- aicc$AICc - min(aicc$AICc)
  aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * aicc$deltaAICc))
  aicc <- aicc[order(aicc$AICc), ]

  # ----- R2 (robust: always returns 19 scalars) -----
  r2_m <- rep(NA_real_, length(mods))
  r2_c <- rep(NA_real_, length(mods))

  for (i in seq_along(mods)) {
    out <- tryCatch(suppressWarnings(performance::r2(mods[[i]])),
                    error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(out)) {
      r2_m[i] <- if (!is.null(out$R2_marginal)) as.numeric(out$R2_marginal)[1] else NA_real_
      r2_c[i] <- if (!is.null(out$R2_conditional)) as.numeric(out$R2_conditional)[1] else NA_real_
    }
  }

  r2_df <- data.frame(
    Response = resp,
    family_used = link_type,
    model = mod_names,
    R2_marginal = r2_m,
    R2_conditional = r2_c,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  aicc_full <- merge(
    r2_df,
    aicc[, c("Response","model","family_used","AICc","deltaAICc","weight")],
    by = c("Response","model","family_used"),
    all.y = TRUE
  )
  aicc_full <- aicc_full[order(aicc_full$AICc), ]

  # ----- coefficients ± SE for all models -----
  coef_long <- data.frame()
  for (i in seq_along(mods)) {
    cf <- as.data.frame(summary(mods[[i]])$coefficients$cond)
    cf$term <- rownames(cf)
    cf$model <- mod_names[i]
    rownames(cf) <- NULL
    coef_long <- dplyr::bind_rows(coef_long, cf)
  }

  coef_long <- coef_long %>%
    dplyr::rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Response = resp) %>%
    dplyr::select(Response, model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

  full_long <- dplyr::left_join(coef_long, aicc_full, by = c("Response","model"))

  # year term recode (keeps all levels)
  full_long$term <- ifelse(grepl("^year_sampled", full_long$term),
                           paste0("Year (", sub("^year_sampled", "", full_long$term), ")"),
                           full_long$term)

  # core recodes (Years, not Days)
  full_long$term <- dplyr::recode(full_long$term,
    "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
    "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
    "Distance_m" = "Distance",
    "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
    "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m" = "Soil×Distance",
    "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Years",
    "Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance×Years",
    "soil_typeGranite:Distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil×Distance×Years"
  )

  coef_wide <- full_long %>%
    dplyr::mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
    dplyr::select(Response, model, term, est_se) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

  table_s1 <- aicc_full %>%
    dplyr::left_join(coef_wide, by = c("Response","model")) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(AICc)

  all_tables[[resp]] <- table_s1
  all_aicc[[resp]]   <- aicc_full
}

SUPP_ALL_OTHER_NUTRIENTS <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_tables)

# View one:
# all_tables[["SO4_mgkg"]]

SUPP_ALL_OTHER_NUTRIENTS
readr::write_csv(SUPP_ALL_OTHER_NUTRIENTS, "SUPP_ALL_OTHER_NUTRIENTS.csv")
```

### Binding the supplemental table 1

```{r}
#| label: building out the supplemental table 1

### --- FINAL: stack ALL supplemental tables into one master table ---

# 1) Put everything into ONE list
supp_list <- list(
  NO3.TableS1,
  NH3.TableS1,
  PO4.TableS1,
  PBray.TableS1,
  Nper.TableS1,
  N15g.TableS1,
  N15folg.TableS1,
  Nperfol.TableS1,
  SUPP_ALL_OTHER_NUTRIENTS
)

# 2) Make one master supplemental table
SUPP_MASTER <- dplyr::bind_rows(supp_list) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Response, AICc)

SUPP_MASTER


# 3) save
readr::write_csv(SUPP_MASTER, "SUPP_MASTER_models_all_responses.csv")


```

## Soil Resistance

### Second strike

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm AICc  Soilresistance second strike

# -------------------------
# Soil resistance (strike 2, carcass only) — log response + years-centered
# 19 candidate models (Gaussian on log scale; (1|site) in ALL models)
# -------------------------

# 0) subset + prep variables
soil2c <- soil_comp %>%
  dplyr::filter(strike == 2, type == "carcass")

soil2c$site      <- factor(soil2c$site)
soil2c$soil_type <- factor(soil2c$soil_type)   # Basalt / Granite

# hypothesis variable: YEARS postmortem (centered years)
soil2c$age_years_centered <- (soil2c$age_days - mean(soil2c$age_days, na.rm = TRUE)) / 365.25

# response: log-transform (assumes all soil_resistance > 0)
soil2c$log_sr <- log(soil2c$soil_resistance)

# -------------------------
# 1) Fit 19 candidate models (Gaussian on log scale)
# -------------------------
SR2.t00 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ 1 + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # null

SR2.t01 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # soil

SR2.t02 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # dis

SR2.t03 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # age

SR2.t04 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type + distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # soil + dis

SR2.t05 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # soil + age

SR2.t06 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # dis + age

SR2.t07 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # soil + dis + age

SR2.t08 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type * distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # soil * dis

SR2.t09 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # soil * age

SR2.t10 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # dis * age

SR2.t11 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type * distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # soil * dis + age

SR2.t12 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type * age_years_centered + distance_m + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # soil * age + dis

SR2.t13 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # dis * age + soil

SR2.t14 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # S:D + S:A

SR2.t15 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:distance_m + distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # S:D + D:A

SR2.t16 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:age_years_centered + distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # S:A + D:A

SR2.t17 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # all 2-ways

SR2.t18 <- glmmTMB(log_sr ~ soil_type * distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = gaussian(), data = soil2c)                                  # 3-way

# -------------------------
# 2) AICc table + SE table (Reed-style)
# -------------------------
SR2.mods <- list(
  SR2.t00, SR2.t01, SR2.t02, SR2.t03, SR2.t04, SR2.t05, SR2.t06, SR2.t07, SR2.t08, SR2.t09,
  SR2.t10, SR2.t11, SR2.t12, SR2.t13, SR2.t14, SR2.t15, SR2.t16, SR2.t17, SR2.t18
)

SR2.modnames <- c(
  "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
  "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
  "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
)

# AICc + weights
SR2.aicc <- data.frame(
  Response = "soil_resistance_strike2",
  family_used = "gaussian_logSR",
  model = SR2.modnames,
  AICc = c(
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t00), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t01), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t02), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t03),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t04), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t05), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t06), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t07),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t08), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t09), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t10), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t11),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t12), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t13), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t14), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t15),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t16), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t17), AICcmodavg::AICc(SR2.t18)
  )
)

SR2.aicc$deltaAICc <- SR2.aicc$AICc - min(SR2.aicc$AICc)
SR2.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * SR2.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * SR2.aicc$deltaAICc))
SR2.aicc <- SR2.aicc[order(SR2.aicc$AICc), ]

# R2 (marginal/conditional)
SR2.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(SR2.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(SR2.t18)$R2_marginal
)

SR2.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(SR2.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t03)$R2_conditional,
```
