```{r}
  performance::r2(SR2.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(SR2.t18)$R2_conditional
)

# coefficients for ALL models (conditional)
SR2.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t00)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c00$term <- rownames(SR2.c00); SR2.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(SR2.c00) <- NULL
SR2.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t01)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c01$term <- rownames(SR2.c01); SR2.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(SR2.c01) <- NULL
SR2.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t02)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c02$term <- rownames(SR2.c02); SR2.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(SR2.c02) <- NULL
SR2.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t03)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c03$term <- rownames(SR2.c03); SR2.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(SR2.c03) <- NULL
SR2.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t04)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c04$term <- rownames(SR2.c04); SR2.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(SR2.c04) <- NULL
SR2.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t05)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c05$term <- rownames(SR2.c05); SR2.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(SR2.c05) <- NULL
SR2.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t06)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c06$term <- rownames(SR2.c06); SR2.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(SR2.c06) <- NULL
SR2.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t07)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c07$term <- rownames(SR2.c07); SR2.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(SR2.c07) <- NULL
SR2.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t08)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c08$term <- rownames(SR2.c08); SR2.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(SR2.c08) <- NULL
SR2.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t09)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c09$term <- rownames(SR2.c09); SR2.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(SR2.c09) <- NULL
SR2.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t10)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c10$term <- rownames(SR2.c10); SR2.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(SR2.c10) <- NULL
SR2.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t11)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c11$term <- rownames(SR2.c11); SR2.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(SR2.c11) <- NULL
SR2.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t12)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c12$term <- rownames(SR2.c12); SR2.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(SR2.c12) <- NULL
SR2.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t13)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c13$term <- rownames(SR2.c13); SR2.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(SR2.c13) <- NULL
SR2.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t14)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c14$term <- rownames(SR2.c14); SR2.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(SR2.c14) <- NULL
SR2.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t15)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c15$term <- rownames(SR2.c15); SR2.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(SR2.c15) <- NULL
SR2.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t16)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c16$term <- rownames(SR2.c16); SR2.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(SR2.c16) <- NULL
SR2.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t17)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c17$term <- rownames(SR2.c17); SR2.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(SR2.c17) <- NULL
SR2.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(SR2.t18)$coefficients$cond); SR2.c18$term <- rownames(SR2.c18); SR2.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(SR2.c18) <- NULL

SR2.coefs_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  SR2.c00,SR2.c01,SR2.c02,SR2.c03,SR2.c04,SR2.c05,SR2.c06,SR2.c07,SR2.c08,SR2.c09,
  SR2.c10,SR2.c11,SR2.c12,SR2.c13,SR2.c14,SR2.c15,SR2.c16,SR2.c17,SR2.c18
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

# pretty term names (ASCII-safe) — UPDATED for years-centered
SR2.coefs_all$term <- dplyr::recode(SR2.coefs_all$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "distance_m" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance_m" = "Soil x Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil x Years",
  "distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance x Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil x Distance x Years"
)

# model-level AICc info
SR2.aicc_unique <- SR2.aicc %>%
  dplyr::select(Response, family_used, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

# wide coef table (estimate ± SE)
SR2.coef_wide <- SR2.coefs_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, est_se) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

# Final supplemental-style table for Strike 2
SR2.TableS2_strike2 <- SR2.aicc_unique %>%
  dplyr::left_join(SR2.coef_wide, by = "model") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

SR2.aicc
SR2.TableS2_strike2

readr::write_csv(SR2.TableS2_strike2, "STable2_resistance.csv")


```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model soil resistance second strike

set.seed(1)

# Additive model diagnostics (SR2.t07)
res_SR2_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = SR2.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_SR2_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_SR2_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_SR2_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_SR2_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (SR2.t18)
res_SR2_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = SR2.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_Nperfol_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_Nperfol_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_Nperfol_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_Nperfol_full)        # outlier check


# -------------------------
# 3) DHARMa residual checks (Strike 2; carcass only; logSR Gaussian)
# -------------------------

# top model (ΔAICc < 2): S:A + D:A
set.seed(1)
res_sr2_alt <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = SR2.t16, n = 1000)
plot(res_sr2_alt)
testUniformity(res_sr2_alt)
testDispersion(res_sr2_alt)
testOutliers(res_sr2_alt)




```

#### Plotting - Fig 2a

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 2a soil resistance


```

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 5a final

# ============================================================
# SR (strike 2, carcass only) — faceted by soil_type, colored by age quantiles
# with ggbreak gap + fully user-controlled y ticks
# ============================================================

# ---- CHOOSE THE TOP MODEL ----
top_sr2 <- SR2.t14   

# ---- 0) safe plotting df (NO NAs in required vars) ----
soil2c_plot <- soil2c %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(soil_resistance),
    !is.na(distance_m),
    !is.na(age_years_centered),
    !is.na(soil_type),
    !is.na(site)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    soil_type = factor(soil_type),
    site      = factor(site),
    log_sr    = log(soil_resistance)
  )

# ---- 1) representative ages (p10/p50/p90) on CENTERED-years scale ----
age_sc_q10 <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(soil2c_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.10, na.rm = TRUE))
age_sc_q50 <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(soil2c_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.50, na.rm = TRUE))
age_sc_q90 <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(soil2c_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.90, na.rm = TRUE))

# ---- 2) prediction grid (distance × age_group × soil_type) ----
dist_seq <- seq(
  min(soil2c_plot$distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(soil2c_plot$distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
  by = 0.1
)

pred_grid_sr2 <- expand.grid(
  distance_m = dist_seq,
  age_group  = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"),
  soil_type  = levels(soil2c_plot$soil_type)
)

pred_grid_sr2$age_years_centered <- ifelse(
  pred_grid_sr2$age_group == "Young (p10)", age_sc_q10,
  ifelse(pred_grid_sr2$age_group == "Mid (p50)", age_sc_q50, age_sc_q90)
)

pred_grid_sr2$age_group <- factor(pred_grid_sr2$age_group,
                                  levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))
pred_grid_sr2$soil_type <- factor(pred_grid_sr2$soil_type, levels = levels(soil2c_plot$soil_type))

# ---- 3) predict on model scale (log_sr), then back-transform to SR ----
p_link <- predict(
  top_sr2,
  newdata = pred_grid_sr2,
  type    = "response",  # Gaussian on log_sr => fitted log_sr
  se.fit  = TRUE,
  re.form = NA
)

pred_grid_sr2$fit_log   <- as.numeric(p_link$fit)
pred_grid_sr2$se_log    <- as.numeric(p_link$se.fit)
pred_grid_sr2$lower_log <- pred_grid_sr2$fit_log - 1.96 * pred_grid_sr2$se_log
pred_grid_sr2$upper_log <- pred_grid_sr2$fit_log + 1.96 * pred_grid_sr2$se_log

# back-transform to soil resistance units
pred_grid_sr2$fit_sr   <- exp(pred_grid_sr2$fit_log)
pred_grid_sr2$lower_sr <- exp(pred_grid_sr2$lower_log)
pred_grid_sr2$upper_sr <- exp(pred_grid_sr2$upper_log)

# ---- 4) colors (Okabe–Ito) ----
cb_cols <- c(
  "Young (p10)" = "#0072B2",
  "Mid (p50)"   = "#E69F00",
  "Old (p90)"   = "#009E73"
)

# ---- 5) ggbreak settings YOU EDIT ----
gap_lo   <- 2200
gap_hi   <- 2800
top_comp <- 0.3   # smaller = TOP panel smaller

# exact y tick labels to show (edit freely)
y_ticks_bottom <- c(0, 500, 1000, 1500, 2000)
y_ticks_top    <- c(4000, 6000, 8000)
y_ticks_all    <- c(y_ticks_bottom, y_ticks_top)

# plotting-only: remove points inside the removed window so ggbreak doesn't slice them
soil2c_plot_nogap <- soil2c_plot %>%
  dplyr::filter(soil_resistance <= gap_lo | soil_resistance >= gap_hi)

# ---- 6) base plot object ----
p_sr2 <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  pred_grid_sr2,
  ggplot2::aes(x = distance_m, y = fit_sr, color = age_group, fill = age_group)
) +
  ggplot2::theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  # points behind (with BOTH horizontal + vertical jitter)
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = soil2c_plot_nogap,
    ggplot2::aes(x = distance_m, y = soil_resistance),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey55",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = ggplot2::position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 120)
  ) +

  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = lower_sr, ymax = upper_sr, group = age_group),
    alpha = 0.18,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ soil_type) +

  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols, name = NULL) +  # removes legend title box/text
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols,  name = NULL) +
  ggplot2::guides(fill = "none") +

  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(breaks = y_ticks_all) +

  ggplot2::xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ggplot2::ylab("Penetration Resistance (KPa)") +

  ggplot2::theme(
    strip.background = ggplot2::element_blank(),  # remove boxes around facet titles
    strip.text       = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.spacing    = grid::unit(1, "lines")
  )

# ---- 7) apply ggbreak (big panel on bottom; small panel on top) ----
p_sr2 +
  ggbreak::scale_y_break(
    breaks = c(gap_lo + 1e-6, gap_hi),  # tiny epsilon so gap_lo stays in lower panel
    scales = top_comp,
    space  = 0.001
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    # remove the extra x-axis stuff on the TOP (small) panel
    axis.text.x.top  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x.top = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.line.x.top  = ggplot2::element_blank()
  )


# -------------------------
# 8) DROP the right-side box + the duplicated right y-axis (ggbreak artifact)
# -------------------------
p_sr2 +
  ggbreak::scale_y_break(
    breaks = c(gap_lo + 1e-6, gap_hi),
    scales = top_comp,
    space  = 0.001
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x.top  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x.top = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.line.x.top  = ggplot2::element_blank(),

    # kill the duplicated right y-axis + its spine/line
    axis.text.y.right  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y.right = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.title.y.right = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.line.y.right  = ggplot2::element_blank()
  )
```

### Site dominates: Plotting - Fig 2b

```{r}
#| label: Fig 2b it's SITE that really matters
# 1) random intercepts (log scale)
re_site <- ranef(SR2.t14, condVar = TRUE)$cond$site
site_ids <- rownames(re_site)

# 2) conditional variance of each random effect (glmmTMB stores this as "condVar")
cv <- attr(re_site, "condVar")

# sometimes cv can be wrapped as a list; unwrap if needed
if (is.list(cv)) cv <- cv[[1]]

# cv should be a 1 x 1 x N array
se_re <- sqrt(cv[1, 1, ])

site_df <- data.frame(
  site = site_ids,
  re_log = re_site[,"(Intercept)"],
  se_log = se_re
) %>%
  mutate(
    mult    = exp(re_log),
    mult_lo = exp(re_log - 1.96 * se_log),
    mult_hi = exp(re_log + 1.96 * se_log)
  ) %>%
  arrange(mult)

# 3) plot
ggplot(site_df, aes(x = mult, y = reorder(site, mult))) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = mult_lo, xmax = mult_hi), height = 0, linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2.0, alpha = 0.9) +
  xlab("Site effect multiplier on soil resistance (exp[random intercept])") +
  ylab("Site") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7))



```

### Fancy mapping plot - Fig 5c

```{r}
#| label: fun map of soil resistance

# -------------------------
# Fig 5c: radial compaction (strike 2) — green (low) → brown (high)
# darker = higher resistance
# -------------------------

# 1) build ring bounds *from your actual distance levels* (no hard-coding)
dist_levels <- soil_comp %>%
  dplyr::filter(strike == 2, type %in% c("carcass","control")) %>%
  dplyr::pull(distance_m) %>%
  unique() %>%
  sort(na.last = NA)

# radial ring edges = midpoints between distances (first starts at 0)
midpts <- (dist_levels[-1] + dist_levels[-length(dist_levels)]) / 2
ymin   <- c(0, midpts)
ymax   <- c(midpts, dist_levels[length(dist_levels)] + (dist_levels[length(dist_levels)] - dist_levels[length(dist_levels)-1]) / 2)

ring_bounds <- tibble::tibble(
  distance_m = dist_levels,
  ymin = ymin,
  ymax = ymax,
  ymid = (ymin + ymax) / 2
)

# 2) summarize soil resistance by ring (NOTE: median is more robust than mean with your ceiling values)
comp_radial2 <- soil_comp %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    strike == 2,
    type %in% c("carcass","control"),
    !is.na(soil_resistance),
    !is.na(distance_m),
    !is.na(soil_type)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(type, soil_type, distance_m) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    soil_resistance = median(soil_resistance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(ring_bounds, by = "distance_m") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    type      = factor(type, levels = c("carcass","control")),
    soil_type = factor(soil_type, levels = c("Basalt","Granite")),
    distance_m = factor(distance_m, levels = dist_levels, ordered = TRUE)
  )
# 3) plot  (ADD dashed ring guide lines + a 10 m outline circle)
gb_cols <- c("#e5f5e0", "#a1d99b", "#31a354", "#a67c52", "#5c3b1e")

# dashed guides (rings)
guides_df <- ring_bounds %>% dplyr::mutate(xmin = 0, xmax = 2*pi)

# single outline circle at 10 m (only if within radius)
max_r <- max(ring_bounds$ymax, na.rm = TRUE)
circle10_df <- data.frame(y = 10)
circle10_df <- if (10 <= max_r) circle10_df else circle10_df[0, , drop = FALSE]

ggplot(comp_radial2) +
  geom_rect(aes(
    xmin = 0, xmax = 2*pi,
    ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax,
    fill = soil_resistance
  ), color = NA) +

  geom_segment(
    data = guides_df,
    aes(x = xmin, xend = xmax, y = ymid, yend = ymid),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.35,
    alpha = 0.6,
    color = "grey35"
  ) +

  geom_hline(
    data = circle10_df,
    aes(yintercept = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.7,
    color = "black"
  ) +

  coord_polar(theta = "x") +

  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = ring_bounds$ymid,
    labels = ring_bounds$distance_m
  ) +

  # granular + fixed range 1000–2000 across ALL panels
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = gb_cols,
    limits  = c(1000, 2000),
    breaks  = seq(1000, 2000, by = 250),
    oob     = scales::squish,
    name    = "Soil resistance (kPa)",
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +

  # 4 panels: carcass/control × soil type
  facet_grid(soil_type ~ type) +

  labs(
    title = "Average radial pattern of soil penetration",
    y = "Distance from carcass center (m)",
    x = NULL
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

## Leaf Traits

### Standard Leaf Area (SLA)

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm AICc SLA
# -------------------------
# SLA (m2/kg) — Steps 1–2
# models + AICc table + Reed-style wide table
# -------------------------

# -------------------------
# 0) filter + prep
# -------------------------
leaf_sla <- leaf_traits %>%
  dplyr::filter(SLA_valid == TRUE, !is.na(SLA_m2_kg))

leaf_sla$site      <- factor(leaf_sla$site)
leaf_sla$soil_type <- factor(leaf_sla$soil_type)   # Basalt / Granite
leaf_sla$distance  <- as.numeric(leaf_sla$distance)

# hypothesis variable: age in centered YEARS (no *_eps vars)
leaf_sla$age_years <- leaf_sla$age_days / 365.25
leaf_sla$age_years_centered <- leaf_sla$age_years - mean(leaf_sla$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

# Shorthand:
# S = soil_type
# D = distance
# A = age_years_centered

# -------------------------
# 1) Fit 19 candidate models (Gamma log; (1|site) in ALL models)
# -------------------------
SLA.t00 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t01 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t02 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ distance + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t03 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t04 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type + distance + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t05 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t06 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ distance + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t07 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t08 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type * distance + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t09 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t10 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ distance * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t11 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type * distance + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t12 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type * age_years_centered + distance + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t13 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ distance * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t14 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:distance + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t15 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:distance + distance:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t16 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:age_years_centered + distance:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t17 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                     soil_type:distance + soil_type:age_years_centered + distance:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

SLA.t18 <- glmmTMB(SLA_m2_kg ~ soil_type * distance * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                   family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leaf_sla)

# -------------------------
# 2) AICc table: AICc / delta / weight + R2, then coef ± SE
# -------------------------
SLA.aicc <- data.frame(
  Response = "SLA_m2_kg",
  model = c(
    "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
    "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
    "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
  ),
  family_used = "gamma_log",
  AICc = c(
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t00), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t01), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t02), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t03),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t04), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t05), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t06), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t07),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t08), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t09), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t10), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t11),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t12), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t13), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t14), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t15),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t16), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t17), AICcmodavg::AICc(SLA.t18)
  )
)

SLA.aicc$deltaAICc <- SLA.aicc$AICc - min(SLA.aicc$AICc)
SLA.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * SLA.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * SLA.aicc$deltaAICc))

# R2 (Nakagawa): marginal + conditional
# NOTE: if some models are singular (site variance ~0), performance::r2() may warn and return NA/partial.
SLA.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t00)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t01)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t02)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t03)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t04)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t05)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t06)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t07)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t08)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t09)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t10)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t11)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t12)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t13)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t14)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t15)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t16)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t17)$R2_marginal)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t18)$R2_marginal)[1]
)

SLA.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t00)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t01)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t02)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t03)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t04)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t05)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t06)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t07)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t08)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t09)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t10)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t11)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t12)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t13)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t14)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t15)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t16)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t17)$R2_conditional)[1],
  as.numeric(performance::r2(SLA.t18)$R2_conditional)[1]
)

SLA.aicc <- SLA.aicc[order(SLA.aicc$AICc), ]
SLA.aicc  # <-- top model is first row

# -------------------------
# 2C) coefficients ± SE (long) -> Reed-style wide table
# -------------------------
SLA.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t00)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c00$term <- rownames(SLA.c00); SLA.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(SLA.c00) <- NULL
SLA.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t01)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c01$term <- rownames(SLA.c01); SLA.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(SLA.c01) <- NULL
SLA.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t02)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c02$term <- rownames(SLA.c02); SLA.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(SLA.c02) <- NULL
SLA.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t03)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c03$term <- rownames(SLA.c03); SLA.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(SLA.c03) <- NULL
SLA.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t04)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c04$term <- rownames(SLA.c04); SLA.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(SLA.c04) <- NULL
SLA.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t05)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c05$term <- rownames(SLA.c05); SLA.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(SLA.c05) <- NULL
SLA.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t06)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c06$term <- rownames(SLA.c06); SLA.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(SLA.c06) <- NULL
SLA.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t07)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c07$term <- rownames(SLA.c07); SLA.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(SLA.c07) <- NULL
SLA.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t08)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c08$term <- rownames(SLA.c08); SLA.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(SLA.c08) <- NULL
SLA.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t09)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c09$term <- rownames(SLA.c09); SLA.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(SLA.c09) <- NULL
SLA.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t10)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c10$term <- rownames(SLA.c10); SLA.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(SLA.c10) <- NULL
SLA.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t11)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c11$term <- rownames(SLA.c11); SLA.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(SLA.c11) <- NULL
SLA.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t12)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c12$term <- rownames(SLA.c12); SLA.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(SLA.c12) <- NULL
SLA.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t13)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c13$term <- rownames(SLA.c13); SLA.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(SLA.c13) <- NULL
SLA.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t14)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c14$term <- rownames(SLA.c14); SLA.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(SLA.c14) <- NULL
SLA.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t15)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c15$term <- rownames(SLA.c15); SLA.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(SLA.c15) <- NULL
SLA.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t16)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c16$term <- rownames(SLA.c16); SLA.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(SLA.c16) <- NULL
SLA.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t17)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c17$term <- rownames(SLA.c17); SLA.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(SLA.c17) <- NULL
SLA.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(SLA.t18)$coefficients$cond); SLA.c18$term <- rownames(SLA.c18); SLA.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(SLA.c18) <- NULL

SLA.coefs_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  SLA.c00, SLA.c01, SLA.c02, SLA.c03, SLA.c04, SLA.c05, SLA.c06, SLA.c07, SLA.c08, SLA.c09,
  SLA.c10, SLA.c11, SLA.c12, SLA.c13, SLA.c14, SLA.c15, SLA.c16, SLA.c17, SLA.c18
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Response = "SLA_m2_kg") %>%
  dplyr::select(Response, model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

SLA.full_table <- dplyr::left_join(SLA.coefs_all, SLA.aicc, by = c("Response","model")) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc, model, term)

# ---- Reed-style wide block ----
SLA.aicc_unique <- SLA.full_table %>%
  dplyr::select(Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

SLA.coef_wide <- SLA.full_table %>%
  dplyr::select(Response, model, term, estimate, se) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Response, model, term, est_se)

SLA.coef_wide$term <- dplyr::recode(SLA.coef_wide$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "distance" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance" = "Soil × Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil × Years",
  "distance:age_years_centered" = "Distance × Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance:age_years_centered" = "Soil × Distance × Years"
)

SLA.coef_wide2 <- tidyr::pivot_wider(SLA.coef_wide, names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

SLA.TableS1 <- SLA.aicc_unique %>%
  dplyr::left_join(SLA.coef_wide2, by = c("Response","model")) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Response, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional,
    Intercept, `Soil (Granite)`, Distance, `Years postmortem`,
    `Soil × Distance`, `Soil × Years`, `Distance × Years`, `Soil × Distance × Years`
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

SLA.TableS1  # <-- print this
```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model SLA


# Additive model diagnostics (N15g.t07)
res_SLA_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = SLA.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_SLA_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_SLA_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_SLA_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_SLA_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (N15g.t17)
res_SLA_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = SLA.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_SLA_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_SLA_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_SLA_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_SLA_full)        # outlier check


# -------------------------
# Step 3) DHARMa residual checks — SLA (top model)
# -------------------------

top_sla <- SLA.t08   

set.seed(1)
res_sla <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = top_sla, n = 1000)

plot(res_sla)                 # main diagnostic panel (red text = potential issues)
testUniformity(res_sla)       # KS test (want p > 0.05 ideally)
testDispersion(res_sla)       # dispersion (want p > 0.05 ideally)
testOutliers(res_sla)         # outlier frequency (want p > 0.05 ideally)




```

#### Plotting - Fig 3a

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 3a sLA

### SLA (m2/kg) — "shitty" plot for top model: soil * dis (SLA.t08) ###

# points df (safe)
leaf_sla_plot <- subset(
  leaf_sla,
  !is.na(SLA_m2_kg) & !is.na(distance) & !is.na(soil_type) & !is.na(site)
)

# prediction grid (distance range)
dist_seq <- seq(min(leaf_sla_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(leaf_sla_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

pred_grid_sla <- expand.grid(
  distance  = dist_seq,
  soil_type = levels(leaf_sla_plot$soil_type)
)

# predict on link scale with SE, then back-transform (Gamma log)
p_link_sla <- predict(SLA.t08, newdata = pred_grid_sla,
                      type = "link", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_sla$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link_sla$fit)
pred_grid_sla$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link_sla$se.fit)

pred_grid_sla$fit   <- exp(pred_grid_sla$fit_link)
pred_grid_sla$lower <- exp(pred_grid_sla$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_sla$se_link)
pred_grid_sla$upper <- exp(pred_grid_sla$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_sla$se_link)

ggplot(pred_grid_sla, aes(x = distance, y = fit, color = soil_type, fill = soil_type)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  geom_point(
    data = leaf_sla_plot,
    aes(x = distance, y = SLA_m2_kg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey55",
    alpha = 0.40,
    size = 1.8,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)
  ) +

  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = soil_type),
              alpha = 0.18, colour = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15)) +
  ylab(expression("Specific leaf area (m"^2*"/kg)")) +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 3a sLA fixed


# -------------------------
# 0) Colors + plotting df
# -------------------------
soil_cols <- c(
  "Basalt"  = "#D94801",  # orange
  "Granite" = "#984EA3"   # purple
)

leaf_sla_plot <- leaf_traits %>%
  dplyr::filter(SLA_valid == TRUE, !is.na(SLA_m2_kg), !is.na(distance), !is.na(soil_type), !is.na(site)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    site = factor(site),
    soil_type = factor(soil_type),
    distance = as.numeric(distance)
  )

# -------------------------
# 1) Prediction grid (by soil_type)
# -------------------------
dist_seq <- seq(
  min(leaf_sla_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(leaf_sla_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE),
  by = 0.1
)

pred_grid_sla <- expand.grid(
  distance  = dist_seq,
  soil_type = levels(leaf_sla_plot$soil_type)
)

# predict on link scale (Gamma log), then back-transform
p_link <- predict(
  top_sla,
  newdata = pred_grid_sla,
  type = "link",
  se.fit = TRUE,
  re.form = NA
)

pred_grid_sla$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link$fit)
pred_grid_sla$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link$se.fit)

pred_grid_sla$fit   <- exp(pred_grid_sla$fit_link)
pred_grid_sla$lower <- exp(pred_grid_sla$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_sla$se_link)
pred_grid_sla$upper <- exp(pred_grid_sla$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_sla$se_link)

# -------------------------
# 2) Base plot (define `p`)
# -------------------------
p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  pred_grid_sla,
  ggplot2::aes(x = distance, y = fit, color = soil_type, fill = soil_type)
) +
  ggplot2::theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = leaf_sla_plot,
    ggplot2::aes(x = distance, y = SLA_m2_kg),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey55",
    alpha = 0.40,
    size = 1.8,
    position = ggplot2::position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)
  ) +

  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = soil_type),
    alpha = 0.18,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = soil_cols, name = "soil_type") +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = soil_cols,  name = "soil_type") +
  ggplot2::guides(fill = "none") +

  ggplot2::xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25)) +
  ggplot2::ylab(expression("Specific leaf area (m"^2*"/kg)"))

# -------------------------
# 3) ggbreak (BOTTOM segment small + no extra x-axis on top panel)
# -------------------------
p +
  ggbreak::scale_y_break(
    breaks = c(4.8, 5.0),
    scales = 8.50,
    space  = 0.001
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x.top  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x.top = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.line.x.top  = ggplot2::element_blank()
  )
```

### Perimeter

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm AICc Perimeter
# =========================================
# LEAF TRAITS — PERIMETER (mean_realPerimeter)
# =========================================

# -------------------------
# 0) subset + prep variables  (FIX: days -> centered YEARS)
# -------------------------
leafP <- leaf_traits %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(mean_realPerimeter), mean_realPerimeter > 0)

leafP$site      <- factor(leafP$site)
leafP$soil_type <- factor(leafP$soil_type)   # Basalt / Granite

# hypothesis variable: YEARS postmortem (centered, per your protocol)
leafP$age_years <- leafP$age_days / 365.25
leafP$age_years_centered <- leafP$age_years - mean(leafP$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

# -------------------------
# 1) Fit 19 candidate models (Gamma log; (1|site) in ALL models)
# Response: mean_realPerimeter (already > 0)
# -------------------------
Perim.t00 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ 1 + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # null
Perim.t01 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # soil
Perim.t02 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ distance + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # dis
Perim.t03 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # age

Perim.t04 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type + distance + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # soil + dis
Perim.t05 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # soil + age
Perim.t06 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ distance + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # dis + age
Perim.t07 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # soil + dis + age

Perim.t08 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type * distance + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # soil * dis
Perim.t09 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # soil * age
Perim.t10 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ distance * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # dis * age

Perim.t11 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type * distance + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # soil * dis + age
Perim.t12 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type * age_years_centered + distance + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # soil * age + dis
Perim.t13 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ distance * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # dis * age + soil

Perim.t14 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                       soil_type:distance + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # S:D + S:A
Perim.t15 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                       soil_type:distance + distance:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # S:D + D:A
Perim.t16 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                       soil_type:age_years_centered + distance:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # S:A + D:A
Perim.t17 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                       soil_type:distance + soil_type:age_years_centered + distance:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # all 2-ways
Perim.t18 <- glmmTMB(mean_realPerimeter ~ soil_type * distance * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                     family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafP)                             # 3-way

Perim.mods <- list(
  Perim.t00, Perim.t01, Perim.t02, Perim.t03, Perim.t04, Perim.t05, Perim.t06, Perim.t07, Perim.t08, Perim.t09,
  Perim.t10, Perim.t11, Perim.t12, Perim.t13, Perim.t14, Perim.t15, Perim.t16, Perim.t17, Perim.t18
)

Perim.modnames <- c(
  "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
  "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
  "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
)

# -------------------------
# 2) AICc table + SE table (Reed-style)
# -------------------------

# AICc + weights
Perim.aicc <- data.frame(
  Response = "mean_realPerimeter",
  family_used = "gamma_log",
  model = Perim.modnames,
  AICc = c(
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t00), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t01), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t02), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t03),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t04), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t05), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t06), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t07),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t08), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t09), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t10), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t11),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t12), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t13), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t14), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t15),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t16), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t17), AICcmodavg::AICc(Perim.t18)
  )
)

Perim.aicc$deltaAICc <- Perim.aicc$AICc - min(Perim.aicc$AICc)
Perim.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * Perim.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * Perim.aicc$deltaAICc))
Perim.aicc <- Perim.aicc[order(Perim.aicc$AICc), ]

# R2 (marginal/conditional) — HARD CODED
Perim.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(Perim.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Perim.t18)$R2_marginal
)

Perim.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(Perim.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Perim.t18)$R2_conditional
)

# coefficients for ALL models (conditional)
Perim.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t00)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c00$term <- rownames(Perim.c00); Perim.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(Perim.c00) <- NULL
Perim.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t01)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c01$term <- rownames(Perim.c01); Perim.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(Perim.c01) <- NULL
Perim.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t02)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c02$term <- rownames(Perim.c02); Perim.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(Perim.c02) <- NULL
Perim.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t03)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c03$term <- rownames(Perim.c03); Perim.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(Perim.c03) <- NULL
Perim.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t04)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c04$term <- rownames(Perim.c04); Perim.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(Perim.c04) <- NULL
Perim.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t05)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c05$term <- rownames(Perim.c05); Perim.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(Perim.c05) <- NULL
Perim.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t06)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c06$term <- rownames(Perim.c06); Perim.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(Perim.c06) <- NULL
Perim.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t07)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c07$term <- rownames(Perim.c07); Perim.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(Perim.c07) <- NULL
Perim.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t08)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c08$term <- rownames(Perim.c08); Perim.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(Perim.c08) <- NULL
Perim.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t09)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c09$term <- rownames(Perim.c09); Perim.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(Perim.c09) <- NULL
Perim.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t10)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c10$term <- rownames(Perim.c10); Perim.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(Perim.c10) <- NULL
Perim.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t11)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c11$term <- rownames(Perim.c11); Perim.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(Perim.c11) <- NULL
Perim.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t12)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c12$term <- rownames(Perim.c12); Perim.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(Perim.c12) <- NULL
Perim.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t13)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c13$term <- rownames(Perim.c13); Perim.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(Perim.c13) <- NULL
Perim.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t14)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c14$term <- rownames(Perim.c14); Perim.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(Perim.c14) <- NULL
Perim.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t15)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c15$term <- rownames(Perim.c15); Perim.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(Perim.c15) <- NULL
Perim.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t16)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c16$term <- rownames(Perim.c16); Perim.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(Perim.c16) <- NULL
Perim.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t17)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c17$term <- rownames(Perim.c17); Perim.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(Perim.c17) <- NULL
Perim.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(Perim.t18)$coefficients$cond); Perim.c18$term <- rownames(Perim.c18); Perim.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(Perim.c18) <- NULL

Perim.coefs_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  Perim.c00,Perim.c01,Perim.c02,Perim.c03,Perim.c04,Perim.c05,Perim.c06,Perim.c07,Perim.c08,Perim.c09,
  Perim.c10,Perim.c11,Perim.c12,Perim.c13,Perim.c14,Perim.c15,Perim.c16,Perim.c17,Perim.c18
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

# term names 
Perim.coefs_all$term <- dplyr::recode(Perim.coefs_all$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "distance" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance" = "Soil x Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil x Years",
  "distance:age_years_centered" = "Distance x Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance:age_years_centered" = "Soil x Distance x Years"
)

# 2) model-level table (one row per model)
# (robust if R2 columns got dropped / are all NA)
Perim.aicc_unique <- Perim.aicc %>%
  dplyr::select(dplyr::any_of(c(
    "Response","family_used","model","AICc","deltaAICc","weight","R2_marginal","R2_conditional"
  ))) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

# 3) wide coefs (estimate +/- SE)
Perim.coef_wide <- Perim.coefs_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, est_se) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

# 4) Final supplemental-style table for perimeter
Perim.TableS1 <- Perim.aicc_unique %>%
  dplyr::left_join(Perim.coef_wide, by = "model") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

# view
Perim.aicc
Perim.TableS1
```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model Perimter

# Additive model diagnostics (Perim.t07)
res_Perim_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Perim.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_Perim_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_Perim_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_Perim_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_Perim_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (Perim.t17)
res_Perim_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Perim.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_Perim_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_Perim_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_Perim_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_Perim_full)        # outlier check




# -------------------------
# 3) DHARMa residual checks (Perimeter)
# Top model = age-only (Perim.t03)
# -------------------------
set.seed(1)
res_perim_top <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Perim.t03, n = 1000)

plot(res_perim_top)                       
DHARMa::testUniformity(res_perim_top)     
DHARMa::testDispersion(res_perim_top)     
DHARMa::testOutliers(res_perim_top)       



```

#### Plotting - Fig 3b

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 3b leaf perimeter

# -------------------------
# Perimeter — age-only plot with TRUE years postmortem on x-axis
# -------------------------

# ensure these exist
leafP$site <- factor(leafP$site)
leafP$age_years <- leafP$age_days / 365.25
leafP$age_years_centered <- leafP$age_years - mean(leafP$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)
leafP$perim_eps <- leafP$mean_realPerimeter + 1e-6

# safe plotting df
leafP_plot <- subset(
  leafP,
  !is.na(mean_realPerimeter) &
    !is.na(perim_eps) &
    !is.na(age_years) &
    !is.na(age_years_centered) &
    !is.na(site)
)

# prediction grid over TRUE years range
age_seq_true <- seq(
  min(leafP_plot$age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(leafP_plot$age_years, na.rm = TRUE),
  length.out = 200
)

# IMPORTANT: model expects age_years_centered
pred_grid_perim <- data.frame(
  age_years = age_seq_true,
  age_years_centered = age_seq_true - mean(leafP_plot$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)
)

# predict on link scale with SE, then back-transform (Gamma log)
p_link <- predict(
  Perim.t03,
  newdata = pred_grid_perim,
  type = "link",
  se.fit = TRUE,
  re.form = NA
)

pred_grid_perim$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link$fit)
pred_grid_perim$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link$se.fit)

pred_grid_perim$fit   <- exp(pred_grid_perim$fit_link)
pred_grid_perim$lower <- exp(pred_grid_perim$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_perim$se_link)
pred_grid_perim$upper <- exp(pred_grid_perim$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_perim$se_link)

# plot: TRUE years on x
p <- ggplot2::ggplot(pred_grid_perim, ggplot2::aes(x = age_years, y = fit)) +
  ggplot2::theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = leafP_plot,
    ggplot2::aes(x = age_years, y = mean_realPerimeter),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey55",
    alpha = 0.40,
    size = 1.8,
    position = ggplot2::position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0)
  ) +

  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    fill = "grey70",
    alpha = 0.35,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.1) +

  ggplot2::xlab("Years postmortem") +
  ggplot2::ylab("Leaf perimeter")


# break
y_break <- c(28, 30)

bottom_tick <- 20


y_top_range <- range(
  leafP_plot$mean_realPerimeter[leafP_plot$mean_realPerimeter >= y_break[2]],
  na.rm = TRUE
)
top_ticks <- scales::pretty_breaks(n = 4)(y_top_range)

# 4) combine (20 will only appear on the bottom panel because it's below the break)
y_ticks <- sort(unique(c(bottom_tick, top_ticks)))

p +
  ggplot2::ylab("Leaf perimeter (cm)") +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(breaks = y_ticks) +
  ggbreak::scale_y_break(
    breaks = y_break,
    scales = 8.50,   # smaller => smaller BOTTOM segment
    space  = 0.001
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    axis.text.x.top  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x.top = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.line.x.top  = ggplot2::element_blank()
  )
```

### Dark Green Color Index (DGCI)

#### glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

```{r}
#| label: glmm AICc top model DGCI

# -------------------------
# 0) subset + prep variables  (DGCI)  — FIX: centered YEARS (not scaled days)
# -------------------------
leafDG <- leaf_traits %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(mean_dgciOriginal))

leafDG$site      <- factor(leafDG$site)
leafDG$soil_type <- factor(leafDG$soil_type)   # Basalt / Granite

# convert + center age in YEARS (Ryan protocol)
leafDG$age_years <- leafDG$age_days / 365.25
leafDG$age_years_centered <- leafDG$age_years - mean(leafDG$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

leafDG$dgci_eps <- leafDG$mean_dgciOriginal

# -------------------------
# 1) Fit 19 candidate models (Gamma log; (1|site) in ALL models)
# -------------------------
DGCI.t00 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ 1 + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # null
DGCI.t01 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # soil
DGCI.t02 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ distance + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # dis
DGCI.t03 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # age

DGCI.t04 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type + distance + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # soil + dis
DGCI.t05 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # soil + age
DGCI.t06 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ distance + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # dis + age
DGCI.t07 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # soil + dis + age

DGCI.t08 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type * distance + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # soil * dis
DGCI.t09 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # soil * age
DGCI.t10 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ distance * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # dis * age

DGCI.t11 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type * distance + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # soil * dis + age
DGCI.t12 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type * age_years_centered + distance + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # soil * age + dis
DGCI.t13 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ distance * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # dis * age + soil

DGCI.t14 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:distance + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # S:D + S:A
DGCI.t15 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:distance + distance:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # S:D + D:A
DGCI.t16 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:age_years_centered + distance:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # S:A + D:A
DGCI.t17 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type + distance + age_years_centered +
                      soil_type:distance + soil_type:age_years_centered + distance:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # all 2-ways
DGCI.t18 <- glmmTMB(dgci_eps ~ soil_type * distance * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                    family = Gamma(link="log"), data = leafDG)                               # 3-way

DGCI.mods <- list(
  DGCI.t00, DGCI.t01, DGCI.t02, DGCI.t03, DGCI.t04, DGCI.t05, DGCI.t06, DGCI.t07, DGCI.t08, DGCI.t09,
  DGCI.t10, DGCI.t11, DGCI.t12, DGCI.t13, DGCI.t14, DGCI.t15, DGCI.t16, DGCI.t17, DGCI.t18
)

DGCI.modnames <- c(
  "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
  "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
  "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
)

# -------------------------
# 2) AICc table + SE table (Reed-style)
# -------------------------

# AICc + weights
DGCI.aicc <- data.frame(
  Response = "mean_dgciOriginal",
  family_used = "gamma_log",
  model = DGCI.modnames,
  AICc = c(
    AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t00), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t01), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t02), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t03),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t04), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t05), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t06), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t07),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t08), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t09), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t10), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t11),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t12), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t13), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t14), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t15),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t16), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t17), AICcmodavg::AICc(DGCI.t18)
  )
)

DGCI.aicc$deltaAICc <- DGCI.aicc$AICc - min(DGCI.aicc$AICc)
DGCI.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * DGCI.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * DGCI.aicc$deltaAICc))
DGCI.aicc <- DGCI.aicc[order(DGCI.aicc$AICc), ]

# R2 (marginal/conditional) — HARD CODED
DGCI.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(DGCI.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t18)$R2_marginal
)

DGCI.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(DGCI.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(DGCI.t18)$R2_conditional
)

# coefficients for ALL models (conditional)
DGCI.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t00)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c00$term <- rownames(DGCI.c00); DGCI.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(DGCI.c00) <- NULL
DGCI.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t01)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c01$term <- rownames(DGCI.c01); DGCI.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(DGCI.c01) <- NULL
DGCI.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t02)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c02$term <- rownames(DGCI.c02); DGCI.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(DGCI.c02) <- NULL
DGCI.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t03)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c03$term <- rownames(DGCI.c03); DGCI.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(DGCI.c03) <- NULL
DGCI.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t04)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c04$term <- rownames(DGCI.c04); DGCI.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(DGCI.c04) <- NULL
DGCI.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t05)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c05$term <- rownames(DGCI.c05); DGCI.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(DGCI.c05) <- NULL
DGCI.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t06)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c06$term <- rownames(DGCI.c06); DGCI.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(DGCI.c06) <- NULL
DGCI.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t07)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c07$term <- rownames(DGCI.c07); DGCI.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(DGCI.c07) <- NULL
DGCI.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t08)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c08$term <- rownames(DGCI.c08); DGCI.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(DGCI.c08) <- NULL
DGCI.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t09)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c09$term <- rownames(DGCI.c09); DGCI.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(DGCI.c09) <- NULL
DGCI.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t10)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c10$term <- rownames(DGCI.c10); DGCI.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(DGCI.c10) <- NULL
DGCI.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t11)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c11$term <- rownames(DGCI.c11); DGCI.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(DGCI.c11) <- NULL
DGCI.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t12)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c12$term <- rownames(DGCI.c12); DGCI.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(DGCI.c12) <- NULL
DGCI.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t13)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c13$term <- rownames(DGCI.c13); DGCI.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(DGCI.c13) <- NULL
DGCI.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t14)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c14$term <- rownames(DGCI.c14); DGCI.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(DGCI.c14) <- NULL
DGCI.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t15)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c15$term <- rownames(DGCI.c15); DGCI.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(DGCI.c15) <- NULL
DGCI.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t16)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c16$term <- rownames(DGCI.c16); DGCI.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(DGCI.c16) <- NULL
DGCI.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t17)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c17$term <- rownames(DGCI.c17); DGCI.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(DGCI.c17) <- NULL
DGCI.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(DGCI.t18)$coefficients$cond); DGCI.c18$term <- rownames(DGCI.c18); DGCI.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(DGCI.c18) <- NULL

DGCI.coefs_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  DGCI.c00,DGCI.c01,DGCI.c02,DGCI.c03,DGCI.c04,DGCI.c05,DGCI.c06,DGCI.c07,DGCI.c08,DGCI.c09,
  DGCI.c10,DGCI.c11,DGCI.c12,DGCI.c13,DGCI.c14,DGCI.c15,DGCI.c16,DGCI.c17,DGCI.c18
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

# term names (ASCII-safe) — FIXED to use centered YEARS terms
DGCI.coefs_all$term <- dplyr::recode(DGCI.coefs_all$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "distance" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance" = "Soil x Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil x Years",
  "distance:age_years_centered" = "Distance x Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance:age_years_centered" = "Soil x Distance x Years"
)

# model-level table (one row per model)
DGCI.aicc_unique <- DGCI.aicc %>%
  dplyr::select(Response, family_used, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

# wide coefs (estimate ± SE)
DGCI.coef_wide <- DGCI.coefs_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, est_se) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

# Final supplemental-style table for DGCI
DGCI.TableS1 <- DGCI.aicc_unique %>%
  dplyr::left_join(DGCI.coef_wide, by = "model") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

DGCI.aicc
DGCI.TableS1

```

#### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: Check residuals for top model DGCI

# -------------------------
# 3) DHARMa residual checks (top model)
# -------------------------
top_dgci <- DGCI.t04   # soil + dis (per your AICc winner)

set.seed(1)
res_dgci <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(fittedModel = top_dgci, n = 1000)

plot(res_dgci)
DHARMa::testUniformity(res_dgci)
DHARMa::testDispersion(res_dgci)
DHARMa::testOutliers(res_dgci)



```

#### Plotting - Fig 3c

```{r}
#| label: regression fig 3c DGCI
### DGCI — soil + distance plot (top model: DGCI.t04) ###

# -------------------------
# 0) safe plotting df (drop NAs)
# -------------------------
leafDG_plot <- subset(
  leafDG,
  !is.na(mean_dgciOriginal) &
    !is.na(distance) &
    !is.na(soil_type) &
    !is.na(site)
)

# make sure soil_type levels match your palette keys
leafDG_plot$soil_type <- factor(leafDG_plot$soil_type, levels = c("Basalt","Granite"))

# -------------------------
# 1) prediction grid (distance range by soil)
# -------------------------
dist_seq <- seq(
  min(leafDG_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(leafDG_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE),
  by = 0.1
)

pred_grid_dgci <- expand.grid(
  distance  = dist_seq,
  soil_type = levels(leafDG_plot$soil_type)
)

# predict on link scale w/ SE, then back-transform (Gamma log)
p_link_dgci <- predict(
  DGCI.t04,                         # <- soil + dis model
  newdata = pred_grid_dgci,
  type = "link",
  se.fit = TRUE,
  re.form = NA
)

pred_grid_dgci$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link_dgci$fit)
pred_grid_dgci$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link_dgci$se.fit)

pred_grid_dgci$fit   <- exp(pred_grid_dgci$fit_link)
pred_grid_dgci$lower <- exp(pred_grid_dgci$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_dgci$se_link)
pred_grid_dgci$upper <- exp(pred_grid_dgci$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_dgci$se_link)

# -------------------------
# 2) colors
# -------------------------
soil_cols <- c(
  "Basalt"  = "#D94801",  # orange
  "Granite" = "#984EA3"   # purple
)

# -------------------------
# 3) plot
# -------------------------
ggplot2::ggplot(
  pred_grid_dgci,
  ggplot2::aes(x = distance, y = fit, color = soil_type, fill = soil_type)
) +
  ggplot2::theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = leafDG_plot,
    ggplot2::aes(x = distance, y = mean_dgciOriginal),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey55",
    alpha = 0.40,
    size = 1.8,
    position = ggplot2::position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)
  ) +

  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = soil_type),
    alpha = 0.18,
    colour = NA
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = soil_cols, name = "soil_type") +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = soil_cols,  name = "soil_type") +
  ggplot2::guides(fill = "none") +

  ggplot2::xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25)) +
  ggplot2::ylab("Dark Green Color Index (DGCI)")
```

### Per-shoot biomass

#### exploratory, plot

```{r}
#| label: plotting 3d
# ============================================================
# Per-shoot biomass (EXPLORATORY) — Option A
# Model: log(weight) ~ distance + site
# Data: leaf_traits, ONLY full_partial == "full"
# Response: weight (per-shoot biomass; >0, no NA per your note)
# ============================================================

# -------------------------
# 0) subset + prep variables
# -------------------------
bio <- leaf_traits %>%
  dplyr::filter(full_partial == "full")

bio$site <- factor(bio$site)

# sanity checks (should be TRUE per your note)
sum(is.na(bio$weight))
sum(bio$weight <= 0)

# log-response
bio$log_biomass <- log(bio$weight)

# -------------------------
# 1) Fit model (ANCOVA)
# -------------------------
BioA.lm <- lm(log_biomass ~ distance + site, data = bio)

# -------------------------
# 2) Summaries you’ll report
# -------------------------

# Coefs (distance effect + site differences)
summary(BioA.lm)

# Model R2 (overall)
BioA.R2 <- summary(BioA.lm)$r.squared
BioA.adjR2 <- summary(BioA.lm)$adj.r.squared

# Extract distance slope, SE, t, p
BioA.coefs <- summary(BioA.lm)$coefficients
BioA.distance_beta <- BioA.coefs["distance", "Estimate"]
BioA.distance_se   <- BioA.coefs["distance", "Std. Error"]
BioA.distance_t    <- BioA.coefs["distance", "t value"]
BioA.distance_p    <- BioA.coefs["distance", "Pr(>|t|)"]

BioA.R2
BioA.adjR2
BioA.distance_beta
BioA.distance_se
BioA.distance_t
BioA.distance_p

# OPTIONAL: partial R2 for distance (extra-clean effect size)
# (RSS reduced vs full)
BioA.lm_red <- lm(log_biomass ~ site, data = bio)
RSS_full <- sum(resid(BioA.lm)^2)
RSS_red  <- sum(resid(BioA.lm_red)^2)
BioA.partialR2_distance <- (RSS_red - RSS_full) / RSS_red
BioA.partialR2_distance

# -------------------------
# 3) Plot (raw scale + fitted lines)
# -------------------------
# fitted lines by site: back-transform exp() to show biomass (g) on y-axis
pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  distance = seq(min(bio$distance, na.rm = TRUE), max(bio$distance, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 200),
  site = levels(bio$site)
)

pred_grid$log_fit <- predict(BioA.lm, newdata = pred_grid)
pred_grid$fit_g   <- exp(pred_grid$log_fit)

ggplot(bio, aes(x = distance, y = weight, color = site)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(data = pred_grid, aes(x = distance, y = fit_g, color = site), linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "B_2020_107" = "#1B9E77",  # greenish (color-blind safe-ish)
      "B_2022_33"  = "#377EB8"   # blue (color-blind safe-ish)
    ),
    name = "Site"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance from carcass (m)",
    y = "Per-shoot biomass (g)"
  ) +
  theme_classic()


```

### Binding into supplemental table 3

```{r}
#| label: building supplemental table 3

# -------------------------
# Supplemental Table 3: Leaf traits (SLA, Perimeter, DGCI)
# Assumes these already exist in your environment:
#   SLA.TableS1
#   Perim.TableS1
#   DGCI.TableS1
# -------------------------

# add a trait label (optional but helpful)
SLA.TableS1$Trait   <- "SLA_m2_kg"
Perim.TableS1$Trait <- "mean_realPerimeter"
DGCI.TableS1$Trait  <- "mean_dgciOriginal"

# bind (bind_rows will keep all columns; missing ones become NA)
STable3_leaftraits <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  SLA.TableS1,
  Perim.TableS1,
  DGCI.TableS1
) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Trait, dplyr::everything()
  )

# quick sanity check
dplyr::count(STable3_leaftraits, Trait)

# write to csv for your supplement
readr::write_csv(STable3_leaftraits, "STable3_leaftraits.csv")

STable3_leaftraits


```

## Seedlings

### Fig 4a: Species richness

```{r}
#| label: species richness

# ============================================================
# Site-level species richness: carcass vs control (paired)
# ============================================================

# ---- 1. Calculate site-level species richness ----
site_richness <- seeds %>%
  group_by(unique_id, type) %>%
  summarise(
    species_richness = n_distinct(species, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---- 2. Create pairing key and wide table for paired test ----
site_richness_paired <- site_richness %>%
  mutate(
    site_id = str_remove(unique_id, "_2025(_C)?$")
  ) %>%
  select(site_id, type, species_richness) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = species_richness
  )

# ---- 3. Summary stats for plotting (mean ± SE) ----
plot_stats <- site_richness %>%
  group_by(type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_richness = mean(species_richness),
    se_richness   = sd(species_richness) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---- 4. Bar plot with SE (color-blind safe) ----
plot_stats$type <- factor(plot_stats$type, levels = c("control", "carcass"))

cb_cols <- c(
    "carcass" = "#F8766D",
    "control" = "#00BFC4"
)

ggplot(plot_stats, aes(x = type, y = mean_richness, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_richness - se_richness,
      ymax = mean_richness + se_richness
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols, guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Species richness",
    title = "Seedling species richness at carcass vs control sites"
  ) +
  theme_bw()


# ---- 5. Paired t-test ----
t.test(
  site_richness_paired$carcass,
  site_richness_paired$control,
  paired = TRUE
)
```

### 4b: Density/count

```{r}
#|label: density count seedlings

# ============================================================
# Site-level seedling density (count) : carcass vs control
# ============================================================

# ---- 1. Calculate site-level seedling density (counts) ----
site_density <- seeds %>%
  group_by(unique_id, type) %>%
  summarise(
    seedling_density = sum(!is.na(species)),  # counts; zero rows already included
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---- 2. Create pairing key and wide table for paired test ----
site_density_paired <- site_density %>%
  mutate(
    site_id = str_remove(unique_id, "_2025(_C)?$")
  ) %>%
  select(site_id, type, seedling_density) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = seedling_density
  )

# ---- 3. Summary stats for plotting (mean ± SE) ----
plot_stats_density <- site_density %>%
  group_by(type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_density = mean(seedling_density),
    se_density   = sd(seedling_density) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---- 4. Bar plot with SE ----
ggplot(plot_stats_density, aes(x = type, y = mean_density, fill = type)) +
  
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_density - se_density,
      ymax = mean_density + se_density
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "carcass" = "#F8766D",
    "control" = "#00BFC4"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Seedling density (count per site)",
    title = "Seedling density at carcass vs control sites"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# ---- 5. Paired t-test ----
t.test(
  site_density_paired$carcass,
  site_density_paired$control,
  paired = TRUE
)
```

### 4c: Presence/absence

```{r}
#| label: seedlings presence/absence 4c

# ============================================================
# Site-level seedling presence/absence : carcass vs control
# ============================================================

# ---- 1. Calculate site-level presence (1 = ≥1 seedling, 0 = none) ----
site_presence <- seeds %>%
  group_by(unique_id, type) %>%
  summarise(
    seedling_presence = as.integer(any(!is.na(species))),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---- 2. Create pairing key and wide table for paired test ----
site_presence_paired <- site_presence %>%
  mutate(
    site_id = str_remove(unique_id, "_2025(_C)?$")
  ) %>%
  select(site_id, type, seedling_presence) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = seedling_presence
  )

# ---- 3. Proportion present for plotting ----
plot_stats_presence <- site_presence %>%
  group_by(type) %>%
  summarise(
    prop_present = mean(seedling_presence),
    se_present   = sqrt(prop_present * (1 - prop_present) / n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---- 4. Bar plot with SE ----
ggplot(plot_stats_presence, aes(x = type, y = prop_present, fill = type)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("control", "carcass")) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = prop_present - se_present,
      ymax = prop_present + se_present
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "carcass" = "#F8766D",
    "control" = "#00BFC4"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of sites with seedlings",
    title = "Seedling presence at carcass vs control sites"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# ---- 5. Paired test: McNemar ----
presence_table <- table(
  site_presence_paired$carcass,
  site_presence_paired$control
)

mcnemar.test(presence_table)

```

### 4d: Ring-based seedling presence

```{r}
#| label: ring based seedlings presence absence 4d

# ---- 0) define ring labels once ----
ring_levels <- c("0–1", "1–2.5", "2.5–5", "5–10")

# ---- 1) define SITE UNIVERSE directly from seeds ----
# one row per site (carcass or control), including zero-seedling sites
site_universe <- seeds %>%
  select(unique_id, type) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(
    site_id = str_remove(unique_id, "_2025(_C)?$"),
    type = factor(type, levels = c("carcass", "control"))
  )

# full site × ring grid
site_ring_grid <- site_universe %>%
  tidyr::crossing(ring = factor(ring_levels, levels = ring_levels))

# ---- 2) observed presence by unique_id × ring ----
observed_ring_presence <- seeds %>%
  filter(!is.na(distance)) %>%
  mutate(
    ring = cut(
      distance,
      breaks = c(0, 1, 2.5, 5, 10),
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      right = FALSE,
      labels = ring_levels
    ),
    ring = factor(ring, levels = ring_levels),
    presence_point = as.integer(!is.na(species))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ring)) %>%
  group_by(unique_id, ring) %>%
  summarise(
    presence = as.integer(any(presence_point == 1)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---- 3) merge onto full grid and fill TRUE zeros ----
site_ring_presence_full <- site_ring_grid %>%
  left_join(observed_ring_presence, by = c("unique_id", "ring")) %>%
  mutate(presence = if_else(is.na(presence), 0L, presence))

# ---- 4) visual: proportion present by ring × type ----
plot_stats_ring <- site_ring_presence_full %>%
  group_by(type, ring) %>%
  summarise(
    prop_present = mean(presence),
    se_present   = sqrt(prop_present * (1 - prop_present) / n()),
    n_sites      = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(plot_stats_ring, aes(x = ring, y = prop_present, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = prop_present - se_present,
        ymax = prop_present + se_present),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance from focal point (m)",
    y = "Proportion of sites with seedlings",
    title = "Ring-based seedling presence (includes surveyed zeros)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()


# ---- 5) paired McNemar tests per ring ----
paired_ring <- site_ring_presence_full %>%
  select(site_id, ring, type, presence) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = type, values_from = presence) %>%
  drop_na(carcass, control)

# brute-force per-ring tests
tab_01  <- table(paired_ring$carcass[paired_ring$ring == "0–1"],
                 paired_ring$control[paired_ring$ring == "0–1"])
tab_125 <- table(paired_ring$carcass[paired_ring$ring == "1–2.5"],
                 paired_ring$control[paired_ring$ring == "1–2.5"])
tab_255 <- table(paired_ring$carcass[paired_ring$ring == "2.5–5"],
                 paired_ring$control[paired_ring$ring == "2.5–5"])
tab_510 <- table(paired_ring$carcass[paired_ring$ring == "5–10"],
                 paired_ring$control[paired_ring$ring == "5–10"])

test_01  <- if (all(dim(tab_01)  == c(2,2))) mcnemar.test(tab_01)  else NA
test_125 <- if (all(dim(tab_125) == c(2,2))) mcnemar.test(tab_125) else NA
test_255 <- if (all(dim(tab_255) == c(2,2))) mcnemar.test(tab_255) else NA
test_510 <- if (all(dim(tab_510) == c(2,2))) mcnemar.test(tab_510) else NA

tab_01;  test_01
tab_125; test_125
tab_255; test_255
tab_510; test_510
```

### 4e: Polar heat map, visualization

```{r}
#|label: polar heat map seedlings

# ============================================================
# FIXED + INTERPRETABLE radial heat maps of seedling establishment
# Uses COUNTS (not saturated proportions)
# angle = degrees (0–360)
# radius = distance (m)
# fill = seedling count per bin (sqrt-scaled)
# ============================================================

# ---- 1. Prepare point-level data ----
heat_data <- seeds %>%
  filter(!is.na(distance), !is.na(degrees)) %>%
```
