```{r}
  mutate(
    presence = as.integer(!is.na(species)),
    type = factor(type, levels = c("control", "carcass"))
  )

# ---- 2. Bin angle and distance (stable, no string parsing) ----
angle_breaks <- seq(0, 360, by = 15)
dist_breaks  <- seq(0, 10, by = 1)

heat_binned <- heat_data %>%
  mutate(
    angle_bin = cut(degrees, breaks = angle_breaks, include.lowest = TRUE),
    dist_bin  = cut(distance, breaks = dist_breaks, include.lowest = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(type, angle_bin, dist_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    seedling_count = sum(presence),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---- 3. Create numeric midpoints directly from breaks (robust) ----
angle_mids <- angle_breaks[-length(angle_breaks)] + diff(angle_breaks) / 2
dist_mids  <- dist_breaks[-length(dist_breaks)] + diff(dist_breaks) / 2

heat_plot <- heat_binned %>%
  mutate(
    angle_mid = angle_mids[as.integer(angle_bin)],
    dist_mid  = dist_mids[as.integer(dist_bin)]
  )

# ---- 4) visual: proportion present by ring × type ----
plot_stats_ring <- site_ring_presence_full %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type, levels = c("control", "carcass"))) %>%  # control first
  group_by(type, ring) %>%
  summarise(
    n_sites      = n(),
    prop_present = mean(presence),
    se_present   = sqrt(prop_present * (1 - prop_present) / n_sites),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cb_cols <- c(
  "control" = "#00BFC4",
  "carcass" = "#F8766D"
)

# then add/replace this in your ggplot call (after geom_* is fine)

ggplot(plot_stats_ring, aes(x = ring, y = prop_present, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = prop_present - se_present,
        ymax = prop_present + se_present),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance from focal point (m)",
    y = "Proportion of sites with seedlings",
    title = "Ring-based seedling presence (includes surveyed zeros)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

## Browse - major issues here after figs 5a and 5b

### Figure 5a: Palatable species browse intensity - carcass vs control

```{r}
#|label: Fig 5a browse on palatable species, carcass vs control

# =========================
# pair carcass + control correctly (2025 only)
# =========================

browse_2025 <- browse %>%
  filter(year_sampled == 2025) %>%
  mutate(pair_id = sub("_C$", "", site))

# site-level summaries
browse_site_2025 <- browse_2025 %>%
  group_by(unique_id, pair_id, type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_plants = n(),
    mean_browse = mean(browsed, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_browsed = mean(browsed > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# reshape to paired carcass–control by pair_id
browse_paired <- browse_site_2025 %>%
  select(pair_id, type, mean_browse, prop_browsed) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = c(mean_browse, prop_browsed)
  )

# how many usable pairs?
browse_paired_complete <- browse_paired %>%
  drop_na(mean_browse_carcass, mean_browse_control,
          prop_browsed_carcass, prop_browsed_control)

nrow(browse_paired_complete)

# =========================
# Paired test
# =========================

# extract the two paired vectors (site-level mean browse)
x_carcass <- browse_paired_complete$mean_browse_carcass
x_control <- browse_paired_complete$mean_browse_control

mean_carcass <- mean(x_carcass, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_control <- mean(x_control, na.rm = TRUE)

mean_carcass
mean_control


# quick effect size (mean difference: carcass - control)
mean_diff <- mean(x_carcass - x_control, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_diff

# paired t-test (intensity only)
t_out <- t.test(x_carcass, x_control, paired = TRUE)
t_out


# simple visualization  - figure 5a, browse intensity
ggplot(browse_site_2025, aes(x = type, y = mean_browse, fill = type)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("control", "carcass")) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    control = "#00BFC4",
    carcass = "#F8766D"
    
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Mean browse score per site",
    title = "Browse intensity (2025)"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

### Figure 5b: Palatable species browse presence/absence - carcass vs control

```{r}
#| label: Fig 5b browse presence absence 2025

# extract the two paired vectors (site-level mean browse)
x_carcass <- browse_paired_complete$prop_browsed_carcass
x_control <- browse_paired_complete$prop_browsed_control

mean_carcass <- mean(x_carcass, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_control <- mean(x_control, na.rm = TRUE)

mean_carcass
mean_control


# paired t-test (intensity only)
t_out <- t.test(x_carcass, x_control, paired = TRUE)
t_out

# quick effect size (mean difference: carcass - control)
mean_diff <- mean(x_carcass - x_control, na.rm = TRUE)
mean_diff

# simple visualization  - figure 5a, browse intensity
ggplot(browse_site_2025, aes(x = type, y = prop_browsed, fill = type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    carcass = "#F8766D",
    control = "#00BFC4"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Proportion browsed per site",
    title = "Browse presence (2025)"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


```

### browse intensity: glmm + AICc/weights + top model selection

Switch to binomial because this is bounded (0-10). I think this is correct.

```{r}
#| label: browse AIC model selection

# ============================================================
# BROWSE (carcass only): 19-model candidate set + AICc (Steps 1–2)
# Response: browsed out of 10 (binomial), drop NA browsed rows
# Always include: year_sampled + (1|site)
# Hypothesis vars: soil_type, distance_m, age (scaled in YEARS)
# ============================================================

# -------------------------
# 0) subset + prep variables  (PALATABLE SPECIES ONLY)
# -------------------------
br <- browse %>%
  dplyr::filter(type == "carcass") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(browsed)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    grepl("^Acacia_", species) |
      grepl("^Terminalia_", species) |
      grepl("^Combretum_", species) |
      species %in% c("Dichrostachys_cinerea", "Colophospermum_mopane")
  )

br$site <- factor(br$site)
br$soil_type <- factor(br$soil_type)  # Basalt / Granite
br$year_sampled <- factor(br$year_sampled, levels = sort(unique(br$year_sampled)))

# age in years, scaled
br$age_years <- br$age_days / 365.25
br$age_years_centered <- br$age_years - mean(br$age_years, na.rm = TRUE)

# binomial response (out of 10 branches)
br$unbrowsed <- 10 - br$browsed


# -------------------------
# 1) Fit 19 candidate models (Binomial logit; year + (1|site) in ALL)
# -------------------------
Browse.t00 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)

Browse.t01 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)
Browse.t02 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + distance_m + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)
Browse.t03 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)

Browse.t04 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type + distance_m + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)
Browse.t05 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)
Browse.t06 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)
Browse.t07 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)

Browse.t08 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type * distance_m + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)
Browse.t09 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)
Browse.t10 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)

Browse.t11 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type * distance_m + age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)
Browse.t12 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type * age_years_centered + distance_m + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)
Browse.t13 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + distance_m * age_years_centered + soil_type + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)

Browse.t14 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered +
                        soil_type:distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)

Browse.t15 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered +
                        soil_type:distance_m + distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)

Browse.t16 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered +
                        soil_type:age_years_centered + distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)

Browse.t17 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type + distance_m + age_years_centered +
                        soil_type:distance_m + soil_type:age_years_centered + distance_m:age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)

Browse.t18 <- glmmTMB(cbind(browsed, unbrowsed) ~ year_sampled + soil_type * distance_m * age_years_centered + (1|site),
                      family = binomial(link="logit"), data = br)



Browse.mods <- list(
  Browse.t00, Browse.t01, Browse.t02, Browse.t03, Browse.t04, Browse.t05, Browse.t06, Browse.t07, Browse.t08, Browse.t09,
  Browse.t10, Browse.t11, Browse.t12, Browse.t13, Browse.t14, Browse.t15, Browse.t16, Browse.t17, Browse.t18
)

Browse.modnames <- c(
  "null","soil","dis","age","soil + dis","soil + age","dis + age","soil + dis + age",
  "soil * dis","soil * age","dis * age","soil * dis + age","soil * age + dis","dis * age + soil",
  "S:D + S:A","S:D + D:A","S:A + D:A","all 2-ways","3-way"
)

# -------------------------
# 2) AICc table + SE table (Reed-style)
# -------------------------

# AICc + weights
Browse.aicc <- data.frame(
  Response = "browsed_out_of_10",
  family_used = "binomial_logit",
  model = Browse.modnames,
  AICc = c(
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t00), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t01), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t02), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t03),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t04), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t05), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t06), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t07),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t08), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t09), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t10), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t11),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t12), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t13), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t14), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t15),
    AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t16), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t17), AICcmodavg::AICc(Browse.t18)
  )
)

Browse.aicc$deltaAICc <- Browse.aicc$AICc - min(Browse.aicc$AICc)
Browse.aicc$weight <- exp(-0.5 * Browse.aicc$deltaAICc) / sum(exp(-0.5 * Browse.aicc$deltaAICc))
Browse.aicc <- Browse.aicc[order(Browse.aicc$AICc), ]

# R2 (marginal/conditional) — HARD CODED
Browse.aicc$R2_marginal <- c(
  performance::r2(Browse.t00)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t01)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t02)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t03)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t04)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t05)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t06)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t07)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t08)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t09)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t10)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t11)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t12)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t13)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t14)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t15)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t16)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t17)$R2_marginal,
  performance::r2(Browse.t18)$R2_marginal
)

Browse.aicc$R2_conditional <- c(
  performance::r2(Browse.t00)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t01)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t02)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t03)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t04)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t05)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t06)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t07)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t08)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t09)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t10)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t11)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t12)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t13)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t14)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t15)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t16)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t17)$R2_conditional,
  performance::r2(Browse.t18)$R2_conditional
)

# coefficients for ALL models (conditional)
Browse.c00 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t00)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c00$term <- rownames(Browse.c00); Browse.c00$model <- "null"; rownames(Browse.c00) <- NULL
Browse.c01 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t01)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c01$term <- rownames(Browse.c01); Browse.c01$model <- "soil"; rownames(Browse.c01) <- NULL
Browse.c02 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t02)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c02$term <- rownames(Browse.c02); Browse.c02$model <- "dis"; rownames(Browse.c02) <- NULL
Browse.c03 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t03)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c03$term <- rownames(Browse.c03); Browse.c03$model <- "age"; rownames(Browse.c03) <- NULL
Browse.c04 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t04)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c04$term <- rownames(Browse.c04); Browse.c04$model <- "soil + dis"; rownames(Browse.c04) <- NULL
Browse.c05 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t05)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c05$term <- rownames(Browse.c05); Browse.c05$model <- "soil + age"; rownames(Browse.c05) <- NULL
Browse.c06 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t06)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c06$term <- rownames(Browse.c06); Browse.c06$model <- "dis + age"; rownames(Browse.c06) <- NULL
Browse.c07 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t07)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c07$term <- rownames(Browse.c07); Browse.c07$model <- "soil + dis + age"; rownames(Browse.c07) <- NULL
Browse.c08 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t08)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c08$term <- rownames(Browse.c08); Browse.c08$model <- "soil * dis"; rownames(Browse.c08) <- NULL
Browse.c09 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t09)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c09$term <- rownames(Browse.c09); Browse.c09$model <- "soil * age"; rownames(Browse.c09) <- NULL
Browse.c10 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t10)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c10$term <- rownames(Browse.c10); Browse.c10$model <- "dis * age"; rownames(Browse.c10) <- NULL
Browse.c11 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t11)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c11$term <- rownames(Browse.c11); Browse.c11$model <- "soil * dis + age"; rownames(Browse.c11) <- NULL
Browse.c12 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t12)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c12$term <- rownames(Browse.c12); Browse.c12$model <- "soil * age + dis"; rownames(Browse.c12) <- NULL
Browse.c13 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t13)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c13$term <- rownames(Browse.c13); Browse.c13$model <- "dis * age + soil"; rownames(Browse.c13) <- NULL
Browse.c14 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t14)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c14$term <- rownames(Browse.c14); Browse.c14$model <- "S:D + S:A"; rownames(Browse.c14) <- NULL
Browse.c15 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t15)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c15$term <- rownames(Browse.c15); Browse.c15$model <- "S:D + D:A"; rownames(Browse.c15) <- NULL
Browse.c16 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t16)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c16$term <- rownames(Browse.c16); Browse.c16$model <- "S:A + D:A"; rownames(Browse.c16) <- NULL
Browse.c17 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t17)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c17$term <- rownames(Browse.c17); Browse.c17$model <- "all 2-ways"; rownames(Browse.c17) <- NULL
Browse.c18 <- as.data.frame(summary(Browse.t18)$coefficients$cond); Browse.c18$term <- rownames(Browse.c18); Browse.c18$model <- "3-way"; rownames(Browse.c18) <- NULL

Browse.coefs_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  Browse.c00,Browse.c01,Browse.c02,Browse.c03,Browse.c04,Browse.c05,Browse.c06,Browse.c07,Browse.c08,Browse.c09,
  Browse.c10,Browse.c11,Browse.c12,Browse.c13,Browse.c14,Browse.c15,Browse.c16,Browse.c17,Browse.c18
) %>%
  dplyr::rename(estimate = Estimate, se = `Std. Error`, z = `z value`, p = `Pr(>|z|)`) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, estimate, se, z, p)

# update term names for YEARS-CENTERED age variable
Browse.coefs_all$term <- dplyr::recode(Browse.coefs_all$term,
  "(Intercept)" = "Intercept",
  "soil_typeGranite" = "Soil (Granite)",
  "distance_m" = "Distance",
  "age_years_centered" = "Years postmortem",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance_m" = "Soil x Distance",
  "soil_typeGranite:age_years_centered" = "Soil x Years",
  "distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Distance x Years",
  "soil_typeGranite:distance_m:age_years_centered" = "Soil x Distance x Years"
)

# model-level table (one row per model)
Browse.aicc_unique <- Browse.aicc %>%
  dplyr::select(Response, family_used, model, AICc, deltaAICc, weight, R2_marginal, R2_conditional) %>%
  dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

# wide coefs (estimate ± SE)
Browse.coef_wide <- Browse.coefs_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(est_se = sprintf("%.3f \u00B1 %.3f", estimate, se)) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, term, est_se) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_se)

# Final supplemental-style table for browse
Browse.TableS1 <- Browse.aicc_unique %>%
  dplyr::left_join(Browse.coef_wide, by = "model") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(AICc)

Browse.aicc
Browse.TableS1

readr::write_csv(Browse.TableS1, "browse_AICc.csv")
```

### Residuals: check for top model

```{r}
#| label: check top model browse intensity



# Additive model diagnostics (browse.t07)
res_browse_add <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Browse.t07, n = 1000)

plot(res_browse_add)                 # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_browse_add)       # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_browse_add)       # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_browse_add)         # outlier check


# Full model diagnostics (browse.t18)
res_browse_full <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = Browse.t18, n = 1000)

plot(res_browse_full)                # main diagnostic panel
testUniformity(res_browse_full)      # overall fit / distribution
testDispersion(res_browse_full)      # over/under-dispersion
testOutliers(res_browse_full)        # outlier check




# -------------------------
# 3) DHARMa residual checks (browse top model)
# Top model = "all 2-ways"
# -------------------------

top_browse <- Browse.t16
set.seed(1)
res_browse_top <- DHARMa::simulateResiduals(fittedModel = top_browse, n = 1000)

plot(res_browse_top)                          # main diagnostic panel
DHARMa::testUniformity(res_browse_top)        # KS test (want p > 0.05)
DHARMa::testDispersion(res_browse_top)        # dispersion (want p > 0.05)
DHARMa::testOutliers(res_browse_top)          # outliers (want p > 0.05)

# optional but useful for binomial count data
DHARMa::testZeroInflation(res_browse_top)     # want p > 0.05 ideally


```

### Plotting? Best browse model? - all models are shit though

```{r}
#| label: graph best model browse intensity

### Browse — “shitty” plot for TOP MODEL (Browse.t14 = S:D + S:A) ###
top_browse <- Browse.t14   # S:D + S:A (per your TableS1 winner)

# points df (safe)
br_plot <- br %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(browsed),
    !is.na(unbrowsed),
    !is.na(distance_m),
    !is.na(soil_type),
    !is.na(age_years_centered),
    !is.na(year_sampled),
    !is.na(site)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    prop_browsed = browsed / (browsed + unbrowsed)
  )

# pick 3 representative ages (p10/p50/p90) on CENTERED-years scale
age_sc_q10 <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(br_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.10, na.rm = TRUE))
age_sc_q50 <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(br_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.50, na.rm = TRUE))
age_sc_q90 <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(br_plot$age_years_centered, probs = 0.90, na.rm = TRUE))

# distance grid
dist_seq <- seq(min(br_plot$distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                max(br_plot$distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
                by = 0.1)

# hold year constant for prediction (use last level, since you sorted levels)
yr_ref <- utils::tail(levels(br_plot$year_sampled), 1)

pred_grid_browse <- expand.grid(
  distance_m = dist_seq,
  soil_type  = levels(br_plot$soil_type),
  age_group  = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"),
  year_sampled = factor(yr_ref, levels = levels(br_plot$year_sampled))
)

pred_grid_browse$age_years_centered <- ifelse(pred_grid_browse$age_group == "Young (p10)", age_sc_q10,
                                      ifelse(pred_grid_browse$age_group == "Mid (p50)",  age_sc_q50, age_sc_q90))

pred_grid_browse$soil_type <- factor(pred_grid_browse$soil_type, levels = levels(br_plot$soil_type))
pred_grid_browse$age_group <- factor(pred_grid_browse$age_group,
                                     levels = c("Young (p10)", "Mid (p50)", "Old (p90)"))

# predict on LINK scale with SE, then back-transform (logit -> probability)
p_link <- predict(top_browse, newdata = pred_grid_browse,
                  type = "link", se.fit = TRUE, re.form = NA)

pred_grid_browse$fit_link <- as.numeric(p_link$fit)
pred_grid_browse$se_link  <- as.numeric(p_link$se.fit)

pred_grid_browse$fit   <- plogis(pred_grid_browse$fit_link)
pred_grid_browse$lower <- plogis(pred_grid_browse$fit_link - 1.96 * pred_grid_browse$se_link)
pred_grid_browse$upper <- plogis(pred_grid_browse$fit_link + 1.96 * pred_grid_browse$se_link)

# Okabe–Ito palette
cb_cols <- c(
  "Young (p10)" = "#0072B2",
  "Mid (p50)"   = "#E69F00",
  "Old (p90)"   = "#009E73"
)

ggplot2::ggplot(pred_grid_browse,
                ggplot2::aes(x = distance_m, y = fit, color = age_group, fill = age_group)) +
  ggplot2::theme_classic(base_size = 12) +

  # points behind
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = br_plot,
    ggplot2::aes(x = distance_m, y = prop_browsed),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "grey55",
    alpha = 0.35,
    size = 1.8,
    position = ggplot2::position_jitter(width = 0.30, height = 0)
  ) +

  ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
    ggplot2::aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = age_group),
    alpha = 0.18, colour = NA
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +

  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ soil_type, nrow = 1) +

  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = cb_cols, name = NULL) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = cb_cols,  name = NULL) +
  ggplot2::guides(fill = "none") +

  ggplot2::xlab("Distance from carcass center (m)") +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25)) +
  ggplot2::ylab("Proportion browsed (of 10 branches)") +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1))

```

### Browse by region + mopane in North only

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Exploratory: browse ~ distance, split by region, palatable spp
# ------------------------------------------------------------


# 1) Filter to palatable species (and drop NA browsed)
br_pal <- browse %>%
  dplyr::filter(type == "carcass") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(browsed)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    grepl("^Acacia_", species) |
      grepl("^Terminalia_", species) |
      grepl("^Combretum_", species) |
      species %in% c("Dichrostachys_cinerea", "Colophospermum_mopane")
  )


br_pal <- br_pal %>% dplyr::filter(type == "carcass")

# make sure region is clean
br_pal$region <- factor(br_pal$region)

# 2) Fit 3 simple regressions: browsed ~ distance_m, one per region
br_N <- br_pal %>% dplyr::filter(region == "North")
br_C <- br_pal %>% dplyr::filter(region == "Central")
br_S <- br_pal %>% dplyr::filter(region == "South")

m_N <- lm(browsed ~ distance_m, data = br_N)
m_C <- lm(browsed ~ distance_m, data = br_C)
m_S <- lm(browsed ~ distance_m, data = br_S)

# 3) Quick look at slopes (what PI probably wants first)
list(
  North   = summary(m_N)$coefficients,
  Central = summary(m_C)$coefficients,
  South   = summary(m_S)$coefficients
)

# OPTIONAL: single table of slope + p-value by region
slope_table <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  data.frame(region = "North",
             n = nrow(br_N),
             slope = coef(m_N)[["distance_m"]],
             p = summary(m_N)$coefficients["distance_m","Pr(>|t|)"]),
  data.frame(region = "Central",
             n = nrow(br_C),
             slope = coef(m_C)[["distance_m"]],
             p = summary(m_C)$coefficients["distance_m","Pr(>|t|)"]),
  data.frame(region = "South",
             n = nrow(br_S),
             slope = coef(m_S)[["distance_m"]],
             p = summary(m_S)$coefficients["distance_m","Pr(>|t|)"])
)
slope_table




# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Carcass-only: browsed ~ distance_m by region
# Annotate each facet with R² and p-value (distance term)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

# 0) filter (carcass only) + keep only needed rows
br_reg <- br_pal
# 1) fit simple lm per region and extract R² + p-value for distance
stats_by_region <- br_reg %>%
  dplyr::group_by(region) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    r2 = summary(lm(browsed ~ distance_m))$r.squared,
    p  = summary(lm(browsed ~ distance_m))$coefficients["distance_m", "Pr(>|t|)"],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label = paste0(
      "n = ", n,
      "\nR² = ", sprintf("%.3f", r2),
      "\np = ", format.pval(p, digits = 3, eps = 1e-3)
    )
  )

# 2) positions for labels (top-left of each facet)
label_pos <- br_reg %>%
  dplyr::group_by(region) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    x = min(distance_m, na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(browsed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(stats_by_region, by = "region") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = x + 0.03 * (max(br_reg$distance_m, na.rm = TRUE) - min(br_reg$distance_m, na.rm = TRUE)),
    y = y - 0.05 * (max(br_reg$browsed,    na.rm = TRUE) - min(br_reg$browsed,    na.rm = TRUE))
  )

# 3) plot
ggplot(br_reg, aes(x = distance_m, y = browsed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  geom_text(
    data = label_pos,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ region, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance from carcass center (m)",
    y = "Browse score (branches browsed out of 10)",
    title = "Carcass sites only: browsing vs distance by region (exploratory LM)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# ============================================================
# North only, Colophospermum_mopane only: carcass vs control
# Exploratory LM: browsed (0–10) ~ distance_m
# ============================================================

# ---- 0) filter to North + target species + clean rows ----
br_mop_north <- browse %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    region == "North",
    species == "Colophospermum_mopane",
    type %in% c("carcass", "control"),
    !is.na(browsed),
    !is.na(distance_m)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    type = factor(type, levels = c("carcass", "control"))
  )

# quick sanity
table(br_mop_north$type)

# ---- 1) fit separate LMs by type (same as your region-split approach) ----
lm_carcass <- lm(browsed ~ distance_m, data = dplyr::filter(br_mop_north, type == "carcass"))
lm_control <- lm(browsed ~ distance_m, data = dplyr::filter(br_mop_north, type == "control"))

# helper to extract n, R2, slope p
get_lm_stats <- function(mod, dat) {
  s <- summary(mod)
  out <- data.frame(
    n = nrow(dat),
    R2 = s$r.squared,
    slope = s$coefficients["distance_m", "Estimate"],
    p = s$coefficients["distance_m", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )
  out
}

stats_carcass <- get_lm_stats(lm_carcass, dplyr::filter(br_mop_north, type == "carcass"))
stats_control <- get_lm_stats(lm_control, dplyr::filter(br_mop_north, type == "control"))

annot_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  dplyr::mutate(stats_carcass, type = "carcass"),
  dplyr::mutate(stats_control, type = "control")
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    label = paste0(
      "n = ", n, "\n",
      "R² = ", sprintf("%.3f", R2), "\n",
      "p = ", signif(p, 3)
    )
  )

# ---- 2) plot (facet by type, like your region facets) ----
ggplot(br_mop_north, aes(x = distance_m, y = browsed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~ type, nrow = 1) +
  geom_text(
    data = annot_df,
    aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = -0.05, vjust = 1.1,
    size = 3.6
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "North only: Colophospermum_mopane browsing vs distance (carcass vs control)",
    x = "Distance from focal point (m)",
    y = "Browse score (branches browsed out of 10)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

# ---- OPTIONAL: one-line test of whether carcass vs control differs (slope and/or intercept) ----
# This is the *comparison* model:
lm_compare <- lm(browsed ~ distance_m * type, data = br_mop_north)
summary(lm_compare)  # look at typecontrol (intercept shift) and distance_m:typecontrol (slope difference)



```
